- **PR-M4.3 тАФ DPO pack PII redaction + stats (ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack (`~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`) ъ░А
  user prompts + assistant responses ые╝ verbatim ьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ░АьзАыпАыбЬ M4.2
  publish ьаД PII / secret ьКдэБмыЯ╜ьЭ┤ эХДьИШ. **ьЛаъ╖Ь ыкиыУИ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_redaction.py` тАФ `redact_text(text)` ъ░А 7
  ь╣┤эЕМъ│аыжм эМиэД┤ ьаБьЪй: API key (Anthropic / OpenAI / Slack / GitHub /
  ZhipuAI тАФ `core/utils/redaction.py` ьЭШ ъ╕░ьб┤ `_SECRET_PATTERNS` ьЮмэЩЬьЪй)
  + AWS access key (AKIA / ASIA) + Bearer token + Email + Phone (E.164 /
  dashed / parenthesised) + URL credentials (`https://u:p@host`) + POSIX
  home path (`/Users/<name>/` + `/home/<name>/`). `redact_pack_row(row)`
  ъ░А 5 эЕНьКдэК╕ эХДыУЬ (`prompt` / `chosen` / `rejected` / `source_chosen` /
  `source_rejected`) ызМ ьКдэБмыЯ╜, ьИльЮР / signature эХДыУЬыКФ passthrough.
  `redact_pack(src, dst) -> int` ъ░А read тЖТ scrub тЖТ write JSONL тАФ missing
  src тЖТ empty dst эММьЭ╝ (graceful), malformed line silent drop, re-run
  byte-equal ъ▓░ьаХьД▒ ы│┤ьЮе. **ьЛаъ╖Ь ыкиыУИ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_stats.py`
  тАФ `pack_stats(path) -> dict` ъ░А pair_count / unique_prompts /
  fitness_delta {min,max,mean,median} / source_{chosen,rejected}_histogram
  ы░ШэЩШ. missing / empty / all-malformed тЖТ ы╣И dict (graceful).
  **redaction layer ыКФ эЪиъ│╝ьаБ 7 ь╣┤эЕМъ│аыжм** тАФ API key ыКФ `redact_secrets`
  delegate ьЭ┤ыпАыбЬ ыкиыУИьЭШ `PII_PATTERNS` table ьЮРь▓┤ыКФ 6 entry (URL
  cred / AWS / Bearer / Email / home / Phone) + 1 delegate. **19 + 8
  = 27 invariant test** тАФ redaction 19 (эМиэД┤ы│Д 9 scrub + empty эЖ╡ъ│╝ +
  no-match unchanged + composed multi-secret + pattern table sanity +
  pack_row field-scope 2 + redact_pack 4) + stats 8 (missing / empty /
  malformed тЖТ ы╣И dict + ъ╕░ы│╕ aggregate / unique_prompts / required
  field ыИДыЭ╜ drop / int coerce / missing source histogram). ы│╕ PR ьЭА
  ы│АэЩШ + эЖ╡ъ│ДызМ; M4.2 publisher ьЩА эХйь│РьДЬ ьЪ┤ьШБьЮРъ░А
  `redact_pack тЖТ publish` эММьЭ┤эФДыЭ╝ьЭ╕ ьИШыПЩ ьЧоьЦ┤ ьВмьЪй. CLI integration ьЭА
  M4.4 эЫДьЖН.

- **PR-PAPERCLIP тАФ Paperclip pattern wiring for self-improving loop mutator.**
  ьВмьаД PR (PR-1 G-A) ъ░А `MutatorConfig.source = Literal["auto", "api_key",
  "claude-cli", "openai-codex"]` knob ызМ ыПДьЮЕэЦИъ│а runner ыКФ source ые╝ *ыбЬъ╖╕ызМ*
  ь░НьЧИыЛд. ы│╕ PR ьЭ┤ ьЛдьаЬ dispatch ые╝ ьЧ░ъ▓░. **ьЛаъ╖Ь ыкиыУИ**
  `core/self_improving_loop/cli_subprocess.py` тАФ `invoke_claude_cli` /
  `invoke_codex_cli` subprocess wrapper. `claude --print --output-format text
  --append-system-prompt <SYS> <USR>` / `codex exec --skip-git-repo-check
  <SYS+USR>` argv shape. binary path ыКФ `$PATH` ьЭШ `claude`/`codex` ыШРыКФ env
  override (`GEODE_CLAUDE_CLI_BIN` / `GEODE_CODEX_CLI_BIN`). missing тЖТ
  `CliInvocationError` (ьДдь╣Ш hint ыПЩы┤Й). 180s timeout. **runner ы│Аъ▓╜** тАФ
  `_default_llm_call` ъ░А `cfg.mutator.source` ъ▓АьВм эЫД paperclip ьЭ╝ ыХМ
  subprocess wrapper эШ╕ь╢Ь, else ъ╕░ьб┤ API path ьЬаьзА (zero-diff for default
  operators). **UI/UX** тАФ `/self-improving config` (interactive ьДдьаХь░╜,
  mutator + petri.<role> + seed_generation.<role> ь╗┤эПмыДМэК╕ы│Д provider /
  model / source ьЮЕыае, Enter ыбЬ эШДьЮмъ░Т ьЬаьзА, ьЩДыгМ эЫД `/self-improving run`
  ь▓┤ьЭ┤ыЛЭ ьШ╡ьЕШ тАФ ьЮЕыае эХДыУЬ *model + source*) + `/self-improving source`
  (эШДьЮм ьГБэГЬ эЕМьЭ┤ы╕Ф) + `/self-improving source set <key>=<value>`
  (non-interactive mutator setter). **TOML ьУ░ъ╕░** тАФ `_splice_section`
  эЧмэН╝ъ░А `~/.geode/config.toml` ьЭШ section header ые╝ ь░╛ьХД in-place key
  ъ░▒ьЛа, ыИДыЭ╜ section ьЭА append, sibling section ы│┤ьб┤. seed-generation
  role ьУ░ъ╕░ыКФ **plural `roles.<X>`** path ьВмьЪй (loader schema ьЩА ыПЩъ╕░
  тАФ Codex MCP catch). `atomic_write_text` + `_toml_escape_basic_string`
  (ъ╕░ьб┤ `cmd_config.py` эМиэД┤). **18 invariant test** тАФ argv shape 2 /
  missing binary / env override / ы╣ДьаХьГБ exit / **timeout** / runner
  dispatch 3 (claude-cli + codex + api_key ым┤ы│Аъ▓╜) / TOML splice 5
  (append + replace + insert + sibling ы│┤ьб┤ + ьЭ┤ьКдь╝АьЭ┤эФД) + source set
  3 + **seed-generation roles plural-path round-trip**
  (writer тЖТ loader validate). ьШБэЦе ы▓ФьЬД тАФ paperclip ьЭА self-improving
  loop **mutator only** (Q1 ьЭСыЛ╡). Agentic Loop ьЭ╝ьГБ эШ╕ь╢ЬьЭА ъ╕░ьб┤ API
  path ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ.

- **PR-M4.2 тАФ DPO publisher adapters (TRL / OpenAI / Bedrock, ADR-012).**
  M4.1 canonical pack ьЭД per-provider DPO эХЩьК╡ ьЮЕыае эПмыз╖ьЬ╝ыбЬ ы│АэЩШ.
  **ьЛаъ╖Ь ыкиыУИ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_publisher.py` тАФ 3 adapter
  эХиьИШ (`to_trl_format` / `to_openai_format` / `to_bedrock_format`) +
  `publish_pack(target, pack_path, out_path) -> int` dispatcher. ыкиыУа
  ы│АэЩШьЭА **pure transform** тАФ network call / SDK import / API key
  read ьЭ╝ь▓┤ ьЧЖьЭМ. ьЪ┤ьШБьЮРыКФ ъ▓░ъ│╝ JSONL ьЭД provider ьЭШ upload tool
  (`openai files create` / `aws s3 cp` / `hf datasets push`) ьЧР ьаДыЛм.
  **Idempotency** тАФ `publish_pack` ъ░А destination ьЭД ызды▓И overwrite
  эХШыпАыбЬ ыПЩьЭ╝ (pack, target) ьЮЕыаеьЭА byte-equal output ьГЭьД▒.
  **Adapter ы│Д row schema**: TRL = ь╡ЬьЖМ triple `{prompt, chosen,
  rejected}` (TRL DPOTrainer ьзБьаС ьЖМы╣Д). OpenAI = messages ьКдэГАьЭ╝
  `{input.messages, preferred_output, non_preferred_output}` (OpenAI
  preference fine-tuning guide ьЭШ schema). Bedrock = generic
  passthrough `{prompt, chosen, rejected, signature, fitness_chosen,
  fitness_rejected, fitness_delta}` (base model family ы│Д schema
  эО╕ь░иъ░А ь╗дьДЬ ьЪ┤ьШБьЮРъ░А эЫДь▓ШыжмэХШыПДыбЭ audit metadata ьЬаьзА). **Graceful**
  тАФ missing pack file тЖТ 0 rows + empty out file. Malformed JSONL line
  + ы╣Д dict + prompt/chosen/rejected str ыИДыЭ╜ row ыКФ silently drop.
  **ValueError** тАФ `SUPPORTED_TARGETS = ("trl", "openai", "bedrock")`
  ьЩ╕ target. ы│╕ PR ьЭА transform ызМ; CLI integration + network upload
  + PII redaction (M4.3) ьЭА эЫДьЖН. **14 invariant test** тАФ TRL minimal
  triple / OpenAI messages schema / Bedrock fitness ы│┤ьб┤ + ыИДыЭ╜ graceful
  / SUPPORTED_TARGETS manifest / publish_pack one-row-per-pack-row /
  overwrite / byte-equal rerun / missing pack empty file / invalid
  target ValueError / malformed line drop / openai+bedrock dispatch /
  no-network import guard (forbidden SDK 8ьвЕ stdlib ьЩ╕ ып╕ьаБьЮм).

- **PR-M4.1 тАФ DPO canonical preference-pack JSONL writer (ADR-012).**
  Consumes M4.0 ьЭШ `eval_response_recorded` event stream тЖТ ъ░Б unique
  `prompt` group ьЭД chosen pile (`rollback_flag=False`) + rejected pile
  (`rollback_flag=True`) ыбЬ ы╢ДэХа тЖТ **top-fitness chosen ├Ч bottom-fitness
  rejected** 1 pair ые╝ emit (ъ░АьЮе ьДаыкЕэХЬ fitness margin = DPO эХЩьК╡ ьЛаэШ╕
  ь╡ЬыМА). **ьЛаъ╖Ь ыкиыУИ** `core/self_improving_loop/dpo_pack.py` тАФ
  `build_dpo_pack(journal_paths, pack_path) -> BuildResult` (appended /
  duplicate / events_seen / unpaired count) + `pair_signature(prompt,
  chosen, rejected)` 16-hex ьЛЭы│ДьЮР + `BuildResult` frozen dataclass.
  **Idempotency** тАФ signature-keyed dedup ьЬ╝ыбЬ ьЮмьЛдэЦЙ ьЛЬ ьЛаъ╖Ь pair ызМ
  append; ъ╕░ьб┤ pack rows ы│┤ьб┤. **Graceful** тАФ missing journal file тЖТ
  empty ь▓Шыжм, malformed JSONL line ьЭА silently drop (per-line parse
  guard). Pack ъ▓╜ыбЬ `GLOBAL_DPO_PACK_PATH = ~/.geode/self-improving-loop/dpo/pack.jsonl`
  (operator-local, NOT git-tracked тАФ preference data ыКФ M4.3 redaction
  ъ╣МьзА ьВмьЪйьЮР-ьВмьаБ). **Pack schema** тАФ `signature` / `prompt` /
  `chosen` / `rejected` / `fitness_chosen` / `fitness_rejected` /
  `fitness_delta` / `ts_chosen` / `ts_rejected` / `session_id_chosen` /
  `session_id_rejected` / `source_chosen` / `source_rejected` (13
  field). ы│╕ PR ьЭА transform ызМ; M4.2 publisher (OpenAI / Bedrock /
  HuggingFace TRL adapter) ыКФ эЫДьЖН. **12 invariant test** тАФ signature
  determinism + field-sensitivity / empty journal / missing-file
  graceful / pair-selection top├Чbottom / chosen-only + rejected-only
  unpaired / idempotency ьЮмьЛдэЦЙ zero append / ьЛаъ╖Ь prompt ызМ append /
  multi-journal cross-session merge / malformed line drop. Rafailov
  2023 DPO formulation ьЭШ `(x, y_w, y_l)` triple ъ│╝ ьзБьаС ьаХэХй.

  (Petri audit / live session / replay test ыУ▒) ыКФ эЫДьЖН PR ьЧРьДЬ wiring.

  ъ▓░ьаХ. `petri_17dim` (default, BC) ьЩА `task_completion` (S4 ьЛаьДд) 2 cohort

  S6 gate ьжЙьЛЬ ы░ЬэЩФ),

  fitness ъ░А ьЭ┤ьаЬ disk ъ╣МьзА эЖ╡эХй тАФ joint ratchet ьЩДьД▒.

- **PR-T5 тАФ Cache breakpoint policy JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).**
  mutator ъ░А Anthropic API ьЭШ `apply_messages_cache_control(messages,
  n_breakpoints=N)` ьЭШ N ъ░ТьЭД JSON ьЬ╝ыбЬ mutate (0..3, Anthropic cap ьЭШ
  messages-block ьаРьЬаы╢Д). **trade-off**: тЖС тЖТ cache hit rate тЖС but
  per-call overhead тЖС (ъ░Б breakpoint ъ░А $0.10/MTok overhead); тЖУ тЖТ cache
  hit тЖУ but per-call cost тЖУ. ux_means.token_cost_norm + latency_norm
  ыСШ ыЛд ьШБэЦе. **5-element эМиэД┤** (S0a ъ▓АьжЭ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/cache-policy.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/cache-policy.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_CACHE_POLICY_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ь╢Фъ░А / `core/llm/cache_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_cache_policy_override` + `apply_cache_policy_breakpoints`,
  schema `{messages_breakpoints: int 0..3}`) / `core/llm/providers/
  anthropic.py` ьЭШ streaming ъ▓╜ыбЬ (эШДьЮм эЩЬьД▒ single consumer) ьЧРьДЬ
  `n_breakpoints = apply_cache_policy_breakpoints(MAX_MESSAGE_CACHE_BREAKPOINTS,
  _load_cache_policy_override())` эШ╕ь╢Ь тЖТ `apply_messages_cache_control(
  messages, n_breakpoints=n_breakpoints)` ыбЬ wire (ьаХь▒Е ы╢АьЮм ьЛЬ default
  3 тАФ no behavior change) / `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_CACHE_POLICY_STRICT=1` env pair. `_validate_schema` ъ░А Python
  `bool` ьЭД ыкЕьЛЬьаБьЬ╝ыбЬ int ьЧРьДЬ ьаЬьЩ╕ (Python ьЭШ bool-is-int subclass
  эХиьаХ ы░йьЦ┤). out-of-range ъ░Т (4, -1, ...) ьЭА `_coerce` ьЧРьДЬ per-axis
  graceful drop. **20 invariant test** тАФ reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 5 + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: Anthropic
  prompt caching docs тАФ `cache_control` count ъ░А canonical knob.

- **PR-T4 тАФ Provider routing JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  ъ░А per-model preferred plan-chain ьЭД JSON ьЬ╝ыбЬ mutate. `resolve_routing(
  model)` ьЭШ explicit-chain branch ъ░А registry's `set_routing` ъ▓░ъ│╝ ыМАьЛа
  policy override ьЭШ chain ьЭД iterate тЖТ ux_means.token_cost_norm ьзБьаС
  ьШБэЦе (ъ░ЩьЭА model ьЭД PAYG ыМАьЛа SUBSCRIPTION ьЬ╝ыбЬ route эХШый┤ per-call
  cost ъ░РьЖМ). **5-element эМиэД┤** (S0a ъ▓АьжЭ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/provider-routing.json` (in-repo) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/provider-routing.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_PROVIDER_ROUTING_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ь╢Фъ░А / `core/llm/routing/provider_routing_policy.py`
  reader (`_load_provider_routing_override` +
  `apply_provider_routing_policy`, schema `{model_name: [plan_id_chain]}`) /
  `core/llm/routing/plan_registry.py:resolve_routing` explicit-chain branch
  ъ░А `apply_provider_routing_policy(model, registry.get_routing(model),
  _load_provider_routing_override())` ъ▓░ъ│╝ iterate (ьаХь▒Е ы╢АьЮм ьЛЬ default
  chain тАФ no behavior change) / `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_OVERRIDE` +
  `GEODE_PROVIDER_ROUTING_STRICT=1` env pair. `_coerce` ъ░А empty chain +
  empty string entry ьаЬъ▒░. ыУ▒ыбЭыРШьзА ьХКьЭА plan_id ыКФ `resolve_routing` ьЭ┤
  ьЮРыПЩьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ▒┤ыДИыЬА (registry.get ъ▓░ъ│╝ None ьЭ╝ ыХМ skip). **21 invariant
  test** тАФ reader graceful/strict 10 + apply 6 ь╝АьЭ┤ьКд (none / empty /
  model-not-in-policy / override / empty-chain-fallthrough / return-copy)
  + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenRouterьЭШ explicit
  per-model plan ordering + Anthropic/OpenAI multi-tier credential
  (subscription/PAYG/batch) ьЭШ cost lever.

- **PR-T3 тАФ Response style guide JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator
  ъ░А 4 typed enum field (`tone` тИИ concise/balanced/verbose, `verbosity_level`
  тИИ low/medium/high, `response_format` тИИ markdown/plain/structured,
  `code_style` тИИ show-first/explain-first) ьЭД JSON ьЬ╝ыбЬ mutate. wrapper-
  sections.json (G5a/G5b) ьЭШ free-form эЕНьКдэК╕ mutation ъ│╝ ы╢Дыжм тАФ T3 ыКФ
  **constrained typed ьДаэГЭьзА** ыЭ╝ ьЮСьЭА expressive style space ые╝ эЪиьЬиьаБьЬ╝ыбЬ
  эГРьГЙ ъ░АыКе. fitness 4ь╢ХьЭШ `ux_means` (success_rate + revert_ratio) ьзБьаС
  ьШБэЦе. **5-element эМиэД┤** (S0a ъ▓АьжЭ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/style-guide.json` (in-repo, ratchet-tracked) +
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/style-guide.json` (operator-local) /
  `GLOBAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH` + `OPERATOR_LOCAL_STYLE_GUIDE_PATH`
  `core/paths.py` ь╢Фъ░А / `core/agent/style_guide_policy.py` reader
  (`_load_style_guide_override` + `apply_style_guide_policy`, schema
  `{tone, verbosity_level, response_format, code_style}` enum-typed) /
  `core/agent/system_prompt.py:build_system_prompt` ъ░А `static =
  apply_style_guide_policy(static, _load_style_guide_override())` ыбЬ
  static ьШБьЧн (cache-eligible) ьЧР `<response_style>` ы╕ФыбЭ append (ьаХь▒Е
  ы╢АьЮм ьЛЬ static ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ тАФ no behavior change) / `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_OVERRIDE`
  + `GEODE_STYLE_GUIDE_STRICT=1` env pair (`autoresearch/train.py` audit
  subprocess). `_coerce` ъ░А unknown field + unknown enum value ыСШ ыЛд
  graceful drop тАФ forward-compat + per-axis isolation (эХЬ axis ъ░А ъ╣иьа╕ыПД
  ыЛдые╕ axes ыКФ ьЬаэЪи). **22 invariant test** тАФ reader graceful/strict 10 +
  apply 7 ь╝АьЭ┤ьКд (none / empty / single / all / unknown-enum / empty-base /
  field order) + wiring + path + env + ALIVE marker. Frontier: OpenAI /
  Anthropic system prompt guides converge on enum-based response constraints.

- **PR-T2 тАФ Skill catalog JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** mutator

  (Voyager ьЛЭ curriculum ьзДэЩФ эМиэД┤). **5-element эМиэД┤** (S0a ъ▓АьжЭ):

  ым┤ьЛЬ). Forward-compat: entry ыВ┤ unknown field ьЮРыПЩ drop. **23

  loop ьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ░▒ьЛа. AlphaEvolve-ьЛЭ ь╜ФыУЬ mutation ы░░ьаЬ (skill body=SKILL.md
  ыКФ Tier 2, ы│╕ surface ып╕ьаСъ╖╝).

- **PR-BACKFILL-SOT тАФ Operator-local SoT layer + env-as-SoT for 4 mutation
  surface readers (post-PR-T1 #1416 fix).** PR #1416 ьЭШ Codex MCP FAIL #5
  (CHANGELOG/PR-body parity ьЬДы░Ш тАФ `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/...`
  operator-local fallback ьЭД ьг╝ьЮеэЦИьЬ╝ыВШ reader ь╜ФыУЬ ы╢АьЮм) ьЭШ ъ╖╝ьЫР GAP ьЭД
  ыйФьЫА. 4 reader (tool_policy / reflection / decomposition / tool_descriptions)
  ъ░А **3-layer SoT chain** ьЬ╝ыбЬ ьаДэЩШ тАФ ьЪ┤ьШБьЮР ъ░А env ызМ set эХ┤ыПД SoT ь▓ШыЯ╝
  graceful ыбЬ ыЛдыг░ ьИШ ьЮИъ│а, audit subprocess ыКФ ыкЕьЛЬьаБ STRICT flag opt-in.
  **ьЛаъ╖Ь helper** `core/self_improving_loop/sot_resolution.py` тАФ
  `resolve_sot(env_var, operator_local, in_repo) тЖТ SoTSelection(path,
  strict) | None` ыЛиьЭ╝ эХиьИШ, 4 reader ъ░А ъ│╡ьЬа. `<X>_STRICT` env name ьЭА
  `<X>_OVERRIDE` ьЧРьДЬ `removesuffix("_OVERRIDE") + "_STRICT"` ыбЬ ьЮРыПЩ
  эММьГЭ тАФ per-reader ыУ▒ыбЭ ы╢ИэХДьЪФ. **resolution order**: (1) env var
  `GEODE_<X>_OVERRIDE` тАФ `GEODE_<X>_STRICT=1` ыПЩы░Ш ьЛЬ strict-fail, ъ╖╕ыаЗьзА
  ьХКьЬ╝ый┤ graceful (no fall-through, env ъ░А authoritative). (2)
  operator-local `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/<file>.json` (graceful).
  (3) in-repo `autoresearch/state/policies/<file>.json` (graceful,
  ratchet-tracked). (4) `None` тЖТ no-op. **`core/paths.py`** ьЧР 4
  `OPERATOR_LOCAL_*_PATH` ьГБьИШ ь╢Фъ░А (`GLOBAL_SELF_IMPROVING_LOOP_DIR /
  <file>.json`). **`autoresearch/train.py`** ьЭШ audit subprocess ъ░А 4
  env ыкиыСР `_OVERRIDE` + `_STRICT=1` ыПЩы░Ш set тАФ ъ╕░ьб┤ fail-fast ы│┤ьб┤.
  4 reader ьЭШ docstring ьЧРьДЬ stale `operator-local` ьг╝ьЮе (S0a/b/c ьЭШ
  Codex MCP catch ьЩА ыПЩьЭ╝ inheritance) ыПД эХиъ╗Ш ьаХэХйэЩФ тАФ ьЛдьаЬ 3-layer
  chain ьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ░▒ьЛа. **19 ьЛаъ╖Ь invariant test** (shared resolver 9 +
  reader ы│Д env-graceful/operator-local 10) + **8 ъ╕░ьб┤ strict test
  ъ░▒ьЛа** (`_STRICT=1` ыкЕьЛЬ). Read-write parity ы│┤ьб┤ тАФ `apply_*_policy`
  ьЭШ deep-copy эМиэД┤ (S0b) ьЧмьаДэЮИ ьЬаэЪи.

### Changed

- **PR-S6-UPDATE тАФ `bench_means` schema 2026 frontier ъ░▒ьЛа (4 outdated тЖТ 7).**
  2026-05-21 frontier bench audit ъ▓░ъ│╝ 4 ь▒ДэГЭ bench ыкиыСР outdated эМРьаХ:
  (a) **SWE-bench** тАФ OpenAI 2026-02-23 ъ│╡ьЛЭ **retire** (saturated +
  contaminated). (b) **HumanEval** тАФ Top-4 93-95% **saturated**
  (qualification bar ызМ ьЭШып╕). (c) **TAU-bench** тАФ Claude Opus 4.6
  telecom 0.993 saturated, Sierra ╧Д┬▓-bench ъ░А dual-control эЫДьЖН.
  (d) **GAIA** тАФ DeepAgent 91.69% saturated, HLE (Nature 2026-01) +
  OSWorld ыбЬ ы╢Дыжм ъ╢Мъ│а.
  **ъ░▒ьЛа schema (7 field)** тАФ Anthropic Claude Opus 4.5 + OpenAI GPT-5
  system card ъ│╡эЖ╡ ь▒ДэГЭ: `swe_bench_pro_pass` (0.25, Scale AI contam-free
  real PR), `livecodebench_pass1` (0.15, contam-free algo),
  `tau2_bench_success` (0.20, Sierra dual-control), `gpqa_diamond`
  (0.15, NYU PhD), `hle_accuracy` (0.10, Humanity's Last Exam Nature
  2026-01), `osworld_success` (0.10, computer-use agent),
  `mle_bench_medal` (0.05, OpenAI ML engineering тАФ self-improving loop
  ыПДыйФьЭ╕ ьаХэХй).
  **ьЦСьЭШ ьХХыае coverage 30.4% тЖТ 46.7%** (14/30 axis тАФ 4 bench тЖТ 7 bench
  ъ╡Рь▓┤). compute_fitness ьЭШ 4ь╢Х ъ░АьдСь╣Ш (dim 0.30 / ux 0.25 / admire 0.20 /
  bench 0.25) ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ьЬаьзА тАФ schema ы│Аъ▓╜ызМьЬ╝ыбЬ frontier alignment эЪМы│╡.
  29 invariant test (ъ╕░ьб┤ 28 тЖТ 29) тАФ `exact_4_fields` тЖТ `exact_7_fields_2026_frontier`,
  missing-fields expected ьИШьЛЭ generic эЩФ (4 тЖТ 7 field ьЮРыПЩ ьаБьЪй).
  ьЛдьаЬ inspect_ai federation ьЭШ multi-eval wiring ьЭА S6b ы│ДыПД PR.

### Added

- **PR-T1 тАФ Tool descriptions JSON mutation surface (ADR-013).** ADR-013 ьЭШ
  ь▓л ьЛаъ╖Ь эСЬый┤ тАФ mutator ъ░А ыПДъ╡м description + hint ызМ JSON ьЬ╝ыбЬ mutate тЖТ
  ыПДъ╡м эЫДы│┤ ьДаэГЭ ьаХэЩХыПД тЖС тЖТ Petri 17-dim ьЭШ `broken_tool_use` (ьЬаьЭ╝эХЬ ьЦСьЭШ
  ьХХыае dim) ьзБьаС ьШБэЦе. **5-element эМиэД┤** (S0a ъ▓АьжЭ): SoT
  `autoresearch/state/policies/tool-descriptions.json` (in-repo,
  ratchet-tracked) / `GLOBAL_TOOL_DESCRIPTIONS_PATH` `core/paths.py` ь╢Фъ░А /
  `core/agent/tool_descriptions_policy.py` reader (`_load_tool_descriptions_override`
  + `apply_tool_descriptions_policy`, schema `{tool_name: {description: str,
  hints: [str]}}`) / `core/agent/loop/_helpers.py:get_agentic_tools` ьзДьЮЕьаР
  (base+registry+MCP merge ьзБэЫД, `apply_tool_policy` ьЭШ forbidden/priority
  filter **ьзБьаД** тАФ description override ъ░А ыи╝ьаА ьаБьЪйыП╝ьХ╝ policy ъ░А ъ░▒ьЛаыРЬ
  description ъ╕░ы░ШьЬ╝ыбЬ эМРыЛи) / `GEODE_TOOL_DESCRIPTIONS_OVERRIDE` env var
  (`autoresearch/train.py` ьЭШ audit subprocess ъ░А SoT ьб┤ьЮм ьЛЬ inject тАФ
  strict-fail). `apply_tool_descriptions_policy` ыКФ `copy.deepcopy` эЫД
  mutate (caller ьЭШ module-level `_BASE_TOOLS` ьШдьЧ╝ ы░йьзА, S0b эМиэД┤).
  hints ъ░А ьЮИьЬ╝ый┤ description ыБЭьЧР `Hints:\n- тАж\n- тАж` ьдДы░Фъ┐И append.
  Forward-compat: entry ыВ┤ unknown field ым┤ьЛЬ. 19 invariant test тАФ
  reader graceful/strict + apply none/empty/override/hints/deepcopy +
  helpers wiring (descriptions before tool_policy ьИЬьДЬ ъ▓АьжЭ) + path
  constant + train.py env wiring + ALIVE marker (`tool-descriptions.json`
  ьЭ┤ `core/agent/tool_descriptions_policy.py` ьЧРьДЬ grep ьЦСьД▒). Frontier:
  OpenAI function calling docs + Anthropic tool-use guide ("clearer
  descriptions yield more accurate selection").

- **ADR-013 тАФ Mutation Surface Expansion via JSON Schema Pattern (Proposed).**
  ADR-012 ьЭШ S0a ъ▓АьжЭыРЬ эМиэД┤ (JSON SoT + reader + dispatcher) ьЭД 6 ьЛаъ╖Ь
  эСЬый┤ (T1-T6) ьЬ╝ыбЬ эЩХьЮе. **AlphaEvolve ьЛЭ ь╜ФыУЬ ьЮРь▓┤ mutation ьЭА ыкЕьЛЬьаБ
  ы░░ьаЬ** (ьЮРъ╕░ьИШьаХ ьЮмъ╖А / silent breakage / Goodhart on benchmark /
  dependency chain 4 risk). ыкиыУа 6 эСЬый┤ьЭ┤ JSON mutation only тАФ ь╜ФыУЬ
  ы│Аъ▓╜ 0. **6 эСЬый┤**: (T1) Tool descriptions (`tool-descriptions.json`,
  OpenAI/Anthropic ъ▓АьжЭ) тЖТ broken_tool_use dim ьзБьаС. (T2) Skill registry
  catalog (`skill-catalog.json`, Voyager ьЛЭ) тЖТ routing ьзДэЩФ. (T3) Response
  style guide (`style-guide.json`) тЖТ ux_means ьЭШ success_rate + revert_ratio.
  (T4) Provider routing (`provider-routing.json`, OpenRouter) тЖТ ux_means
  ьЭШ token_cost_norm. (T5) Cache breakpoint policy (`cache-policy.json`,
  Anthropic prompt caching) тЖТ M3 ьЩА ъ▓░эХй. (T6) Heuristic indicators
  (`heuristics.json`, Promptbreeder ьЛЭ) тЖТ gaia_accuracy ьШБэЦе. **5-element
  эМиэД┤**: SoT эММьЭ╝ / Path constant / Reader ыкиыУИ / Inference ьзДьЮЕьаР /
  Env var override (S0a ъ▓АьжЭ). **4-step lifecycle**: operator/mutator
  JSON write тЖТ reader graceful load тЖТ apply_*_policy default+override
  ъ▓░эХй тЖТ ьЧРьЭ┤ьаДэК╕ ьЭСыЛ╡ ьЛЬ ьаХь▒Е ы░ШьШБ. 16 invariant test тАФ ADR ы│╕ым╕ьЭШ
  Status/Context/Decision/Consequences/Reference + 6 T-surface ыкЕьД╕
  + 5-element эМиэД┤ + AlphaEvolve ы░░ьаЬ 4 risk + frontier reference 6
  + ADR-012 cross-reference + ьЪ░ьДаьИЬьЬД 6 + эЫДьЖН PR ьЛЬэААьКд + fitness ь╢Х
  ьШБэЦе cross-check. эЫДьЖН PR T1-T6 task ыУ▒ыбЭ (#78-#83).

- **PR-S6 тАФ `bench_means` + Petri/bench cross-validation gate (Path C
  inspect_ai federation).** ADR-012 ┬зS6 тАФ frontier capability evaluation
  эЖ╡эХйьЬ╝ыбЬ fitness 4ь╢Х ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ. Petri (alignment) + bench (capability)
  ьЭШ **ьЦСы░йэЦе cross-validation gate** ыбЬ Goodhart fooling ы░йьЦ┤.
  **`autoresearch/bench_means.py` ьЛаьДд** тАФ 4-field schema (swe_bench_pass
  0.40 + tau_bench_success 0.30 + humaneval_pass1 0.15 + gaia_accuracy
  0.15, эХй 1.0) + `compute_bench_aggregate` (None тЖТ 0.5 neutral) +
  `validate_bench_schema` + `detect_cross_validation_conflict` (Petri
  promote + bench regress = "alignment_only_fooling", bench promote +
  Petri critical regress = "capability_at_alignment_cost") +
  `collect_bench_means_from_inspect_ai` (S6b placeholder).
  **`autoresearch/train.py` 4ь╢Х ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ** тАФ FITNESS_DIM_4AX (0.30) +
  FITNESS_UX_4AX (0.25) + FITNESS_ADMIRE_4AX (0.20) + FITNESS_BENCH_4AX
  (0.25, эХй 1.0). dim ы╣ДьдСьЭ┤ 0.40 тЖТ 0.30 ьЬ╝ыбЬ ь╢Фъ░А ъ░РьЖМ. `compute_fitness`
  ьЧР `bench_means` + `baseline_bench_means` ьЭ╕ьЮР ь╢Фъ░А. ы╢Дъ╕░ ыбЬьзБ тАФ
  ьЕЛ ыЛд None / ux only / admire эЩЬьД▒ (3ь╢Х) / bench эЩЬьД▒ (4ь╢Х +
  cross-validation gate). Conflict ъ▓Аь╢Ь ьЛЬ 0.0 strict-reject. **ьЦСьЭШ
  ьХХыае coverage 7/23 = 30.4% тЖТ 11/27 = 40.7% эЩХьЮе** (Petri ьЭШ 1/17 эХЬъ│Д
  ыПМэММ, frontier эХйьЭШ ыКеъ░А). 28 invariant
  test (S6) + 30 (S2) + 27 (S1) = **85/85 эЖ╡ъ│╝**. inspect_ai federation
  ьЭШ ьЛдьаЬ multi-eval wiring (Petri scenario + SWE/TAU task ыПЩьЛЬ ьЛдэЦЙ)
  ьЭА S6b (ы│ДыПД PR).

- **PR-S2 тАФ `admire_means` fitness ь╢Х + 3ь╢Х ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ (ADR-012 ыЛиъ╕░).**
  S1 ьЭШ `ux_means` ьШЖьЧР ь╢Фъ░АыРШыКФ **ь▓┤ъ░Р эТИьзИ** ьЦСьЭШ ьХХыае ь╢ХьЭШ
  **schema + math + hook interface** ьЛаьДд. ьЛдьаЬ `plugins/seed_generation/agents/ranker.py`
  ьЭШ ELO + 3-voter panel эШ╕ь╢Ь wiring ьЭА S2b (ы│ДыПД PR) тАФ ы│╕ PR ьЧРьДЬыКФ
  hook (`collect_admire_means_from_ranker`) ъ░А placeholder (None ы░ШэЩШ)
  ыбЬ ranker эШ╕ь╢Ь ьЮРыжмые╝ ыкЕьЛЬызМ эХи. **`autoresearch/admire_means.py` ьЛаьДд** тАФ
  2-field schema (`pairwise_win_rate` 0.70 + `human_calibration_corr`
  0.30, эХй 1.0) + `compute_admire_aggregate` (None тЖТ 0.5 neutral,
  calibration dampening ьЬ╝ыбЬ Goodhart fooling ы░йьЦ┤) +
  `CALIBRATION_THRESHOLD = 0.7` (corr ып╕ызМ ьЛЬ win_rate ы╣ДыбА ъ░РьЗа) +
  `validate_admire_schema` + `collect_admire_means_from_ranker` (S2b
  placeholder, эШДьЮм None ы░ШэЩШ). **`autoresearch/train.py` 3ь╢Х ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ** тАФ
  `FITNESS_DIM_WEIGHT = 0.40` + `FITNESS_UX_WEIGHT = 0.30` +
  `FITNESS_ADMIRE_WEIGHT = 0.30` ьЛаьДд (эХй 1.0). `compute_fitness` ьЧР
  `admire_means` optional ьЭ╕ьЮР ь╢Фъ░А. ы╢Дъ╕░ ыбЬьзБ: (a) ux + admire ыСШ ыЛд
  None тЖТ dim-only fallback (эШДьЮм behavior ы│┤ьб┤) (b) ux ызМ тЖТ S1 ьЭШ
  0.7/0.3 (backwards compat) (c) admire ызМ ыШРыКФ ыСШ ыЛд тЖТ 3ь╢Х ьЮмы░░ы╢Д
  0.4/0.3/0.3 (ux ыИДыЭ╜ ьЛЬ neutral 0.5). critical gate strict-reject ыКФ
  admire ьЩА ым┤ъ┤А ы│┤ьб┤. **Goodhart ы░йьЦ┤**: judge model ьг╝ъ╕░ ъ╡Рь▓┤ + 3-voter
  cross-provider panel (PR-COSCI-1 ьЭШ `required_diversity_providers`
  ъ╖ЬьХ╜ ьЮмьВмьЪй) + calibration dampening (corr < threshold ьЛЬ win_rate
  ы╣ДыбА ъ░РьЗа) + ы╢Дъ╕░ human L4 batch refresh (S2b). **28 invariant test
  (S2)** + 27 invariant test (S1 backwards compat) = **55/55 эЖ╡ъ│╝**.
  ranker.py ьЭШ ьЛдьаЬ ELO + voter panel эШ╕ь╢Ь wiring ьЭА S2b ы╢Дыжм тАФ
  schema ьХИьаХьД▒ ъ▓АьжЭ эЫД ьзДэЦЙ.

- **PR-S1 тАФ `ux_means` fitness ь╢Х ьЛаьДд (ADR-012 ыЛиъ╕░).** ADR-012
  ┬зDecision.2 ьЭШ fitness ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ ь▓л ыЛиъ│Д тАФ Petri 17-dim ьЭШ ьЭМьЭШ ьХХыае
  (ьХИ ызЭъ░АьзАъ╕░) эО╕эЦе risk ые╝ ь░иыЛиэХШъ╕░ ьЬДэХЬ **ьЦСьЭШ ьХХыае ь╢Х**.
  **`autoresearch/ux_means.py` ьЛаьДд** тАФ 4-field schema (`success_rate`
  / `token_cost_norm` / `revert_ratio_norm` / `latency_norm`) + ъ░АьдСь╣Ш
  (0.40 / 0.30 / 0.20 / 0.10, эХй 1.0) + `normalize_ux_field`
  (lower-is-better metric ьЭШ invert ь▓Шыжм) + `compute_ux_aggregate`
  (`None` тЖТ 0.5 neutral) + `validate_ux_schema` + `collect_ux_means_from_sources`
  (S1b placeholder, эШДьЮм `None` ы░ШэЩШ). **`autoresearch/train.py:compute_fitness`
  ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ** тАФ `ux_means` optional ьЭ╕ьЮР ь╢Фъ░А. `None` ьЭ┤ый┤ dim-only
  fallback (no-op, эШДьЮм эЦЙыПЩ ы│┤ьб┤). ьг╝ьЦ┤ьзАый┤ `dim_part * 0.7 + ux_part
  * 0.3` ъ░АьдС эХй (admire_means ьЛаьДд S2 эЫД 0.4/0.3/0.3 ьЮмы░░ы╢Д ьШИьаХ).
  Critical gate (regress ьЛЬ `0.0`) ыКФ ux_means ьЩА ым┤ъ┤АэХШъ▓М ы│┤ьб┤ тАФ
  strict-reject ьаХь▒Е. **27 invariant test** тАФ schema ъ░АьдСь╣Ш эХй / 4-field
  exact set / normalize invert ьЭШ lower-is-better / aggregate
  weighted-sum / validate 5 reject ь╝АьЭ┤ьКд / compute_fitness multi-axis
  4 ь╝АьЭ┤ьКд (ux=None dim-only / perfect ux ьжЭъ░А / zero ux ъ░РьЖМ / critical
  gate strict-reject). 4 source ьЭШ ьЛдьаЬ wiring (RunLog / LLMUsageAccumulator
  / git history / OTel trace) ьЭА S1b (ы│ДыПД PR) тАФ schema ьХИьаХьД▒ ъ▓АьжЭ эЫД
  ы╢Дыжм ьзДэЦЙ. ADR-012 ыЛиъ╕░ ьЛЬэААьКдьЭШ G2 ъ▓МьЭ┤эК╕ (ьЭМьЭШ ьХХыае 90%+ эО╕эЦе
  4ьг╝ ь╕бьаХ) ъ░А ы╣ДыбЬьЖМ ь╕бьаХ ъ░АыКеэХ┤ьзР.

### Changed

- **PR-S0d тАФ `retrieval` slot deprecate (ADR-012 ыЛиъ╕░ ьЛЬэААьКд ьвЕыгМ).**
  PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ьЭШ 4 dead slot ьдС ызИьзАызЙ ь▓Шь╣Ш тАФ `TARGET_KINDS` ьЧРьДЬ
  `retrieval` ьаЬъ▒░ тЖТ **5ь╢Х тЖТ 4ь╢Х ыкЕьЛЬ ь╢ХьЖМ**. `GLOBAL_RETRIEVAL_POLICY_PATH`
  + `_KIND_TO_PATH` ьЭШ `retrieval` ыздэХСьЭА ы│┤ьб┤ (ы│ДыПД ADR ыбЬ ып╕ыЮШ RAG
  ьЭ╕эФДыЭ╝ ьЛаьДд ьЛЬ ы│╡ьЫР ъ░АыКе).
  **ъ▓░ьаХ ъ╖╝ъ▒░** тАФ frontier 3-source эХйьЭШ Wiki injection (ADR-012
  ┬зDecision.3a):
  (1) **Boris Cherny** (Claude Code architect) *Latent Space 2025-05*:
  "Originally we tried RAG... **agentic search outperformed everything.
  By a lot. By a lot**. At the cost of latency and tokens, you now have
  really awesome search **without security downsides**"
  (https://www.latent.space/p/claude-code).
  (2) **arXiv 2605.15184** (PwC, 2026-05): 116-Q LongMemEval ├Ч Claude
  Code/Codex/Gemini CLI/Chronos 4-harness ъ╡Рь░и тАФ "**grep generally
  yields higher accuracy than vector retrieval**".
  (3) **Anthropic ъ│╡ьЛЭ blog**: "navigates the way a software engineer
  would: traverses file system, reads files, uses grep" + staleness
  ьШИьЛЬ ("RAG returns a function the team renamed two weeks ago").
  **Frontier embedding эЮИэК╕ыз╡** (ADR ┬зDecision.3a) тАФ code/agent ыПДыйФьЭ╕
  3/3 (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Devin) ьЭ┤ embedding эЪМэФ╝, memory
  ыПДыйФьЭ╕ (Hermes-Agent / OpenClaw) ызМ ьаБъ╖╣ ьВмьЪй. GEODE ьЭШ self-improving
  loop ьаХь▒Е ьзДэЩФыКФ code/agent ыПДыйФьЭ╕ тЖТ Claude Code ыЭ╝ьЭ╕.
  **Cursor ьХ╜эЩФ 4-ь╢Х ьЫРьЭ╕**: long context эЩХьЮе / prompt caching 92%
  prefix reuse + 81% ы╣ДьЪй ьаИъ░Р / agentic search ьЭШ ъ▓╜эЧШьаБ ьЪ░ьД╕ / Bitter
  Lesson tool use ьД▒ьИЩыПД.
  Boris ьЭШ 6 ъ╖╝ъ▒░ ьдС 4ъ░Ь (Performance / Index staleness / Precision /
  Bitter Lesson) ъ░А GEODE ьЭШ retrieval slot ьЧР ьзБьаС ьаБьЪй.
  **invariant test ъ░▒ьЛа**: ADR ALIVE/DEAD/DEPRECATED count
  (`==4/==0/>=1`), `TARGET_KINDS` exact set ъ▓АьжЭ
  (`{prompt, tool_policy, decomposition, reflection}`), path constant
  ы│┤ьб┤ ъ▓АьжЭ, DEAD parametrize placeholder эЩФ. audit doc Post-S0d update
  ьД╣ьЕШ + `4/4 ALIVE` anchor.
  **ADR-012 ыЛиъ╕░ S0 ьЛЬэААьКд ьвЕыгМ** тАФ 5ь╢Х ьзДэЩФ ый┤ьаБ 1ь╢Х тЖТ 4ь╢Х ыкЕьЛЬ ьХИьаХэЩФ.
  ыЛдьЭМ PR: S1 (`ux_means` fitness ь╢Х ьЛаьДд).

### Added

- **PR-S0c тАФ `decomposition` reader ьЛаьДд (ADR-012 dead slot ьВ┤ыжмъ╕░ #3).**
  PR-S0a/S0b ьЭШ эМиэД┤ ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ь░иьЪй. **schema** (3 field ыкиыСР optional,
  string): `system_prompt` (ьаДь▓┤ override тАФ prefix/suffix ым┤ьЛЬ) /
  `prefix` (default ьХЮьЧР ь╢Фъ░А) / `suffix` (default ыТдьЧР ь╢Фъ░А). 3-mode
  ьаХь▒ЕьЬ╝ыбЬ `load_prompt` ъ▓░ъ│╝ые╝ ы│АэШХ. **Resolution order**: тСа
  `GEODE_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` (audit, strict) тСб
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/decomposition.json` (daily, graceful)
  тСв `None`. ыЛиьЭ╝ ьаБьЪй ьзАьаР: `core/orchestration/goal_decomposer.py:_llm_decompose`
  ьЭШ `load_prompt("decomposer", "system")` эШ╕ь╢Ь ьзБэЫД тАФ
  `apply_decomposition_policy` ыбЬ system prompt ьаХъ╖ЬэЩФ эЫД `call_llm_parsed`
  ьЧР ьаДыЛм. **эЪМъ╖А marker**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT
  `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader` parametrize ьЧРьДЬ
  `decomposition.json` ьаЬъ▒░ + ьГИ `test_decomposition_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0c`.
  audit doc Post-S0c update ьД╣ьЕШ + 4/5 ALIVE anchor. ADR-012 Tier 1
  эСЬ + invariant test ALIVE/DEAD count (`==3/==2` тЖТ `==4/==1`) ыПЩъ╕░эЩФ.
  `autoresearch/train.py` env wiring ьЧР `GEODE_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_OVERRIDE`
  ь╢Фъ░А. ROI: `task_success_rate` (S1 ьЭШ `ux_means` эХЬ ь╢Х) ьШБэЦе тАФ ьЮСьЧЕ
  ы╢ДэХ┤ эТИьзИьЭ┤ task ьЩДьИШьЬиыбЬ ьзБъ▓░. 18 new invariant + ъ╕░ьб┤ test эХиъ╗Ш
  эЖ╡ъ│╝ (ь┤Э 91 test ъ╖╕ыж░). **ADR-012 ыЛиъ╕░ ьЛЬэААьКдьЭШ S0a/S0b/S0c ьЩДыгМ**
  тЖТ 5ь╢Х ьзДэЩФ ый┤ьаБ 1ь╢Х тЖТ 4ь╢Х эЪМы│╡. ыВиьЭА dead slot ьЭА `retrieval` (S0d
  ь▓Шь╣Ш ъ▓░ьаХ ьШИьаХ тАФ deprecate or RAG ьЛаьДд).

- **PR-S0b тАФ `reflection` reader ьЛаьДд (ADR-012 dead slot ьВ┤ыжмъ╕░ #2).**
  PR-S0a (#1407) ьЭШ эМиэД┤ьЭД ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ь░иьЪйэХ┤ ыСР ы▓Иьз╕ dead slot
  (`reflection`) ьЭД ьВ┤ыж╝. **schema** (ыСР field ыкиыСР optional, string):
  `description` (`_REFLECTION_TOOL["description"]` override) /
  `system_prompt` (`_SYSTEM_PROMPT` override). `input_schema` ьЩА `name`
  ьЭА mutate ыМАьГБ ьХДыЛШ тАФ `record_reflection` ьЭШ typed payload contract
  (`hypotheses` / `confidence` / `next_action_hint`) ы│┤ьб┤. **Resolution
  order**: тСа `GEODE_REFLECTION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` env var (audit
  subprocess, strict тАФ schema ьЛдэМи ьЛЬ RuntimeError) тСб
  `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/reflection.json` (daily-run, graceful)
  тСв `None`. ыЛиьЭ╝ ьаБьЪй ьзАьаР: `core/agent/loop/_reflection.py` ьЭШ
  reflection LLM `agentic_call` ьзБьаД тАФ `apply_reflection_policy` ъ░А
  `(tool, system_prompt)` эКЬэФМ ьаХъ╖ЬэЩФ эЫД `tools=[active_tool]` +
  `system=active_system` ьЬ╝ыбЬ ьаДыЛм. Tool dict ьЭА deep-copy эЫД mutate эХ┤ьДЬ
  module-level constant `_REFLECTION_TOOL` ьЭШ ьШдьЧ╝ ы░йьзА. **Read-Write
  parity**: `write_policy()` ъ░А `dict[str, str]` ызМ ьзБыамэЩФэХШыпАыбЬ reader
  ыПД string payload ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ьИШьЪй (S0a ьЭШ list/string ыСР эШХэГЬ ьаХъ╖ЬэЩФыКФ
  reflection ьЧРьДЬыКФ ы│╕ьзИ string ьЭ┤ыЭ╝ split ы╢ИэХДьЪФ). **эЪМъ╖А marker
  ьЭШ ьЭШыПДыРЬ ы░ЬэЩФ**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ьЭШ `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader`
  parametrize ьЧРьДЬ `reflection.json` ьаЬъ▒░ + ьГИ
  `test_reflection_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0b` ь╢Фъ░А. audit doc ьЭШ
  ьГБэГЬэСЬьЧР `reflection` эЦЙ ALIVE ъ░▒ьЛа + Post-S0b update ьД╣ьЕШ + 3/5 ALIVE
  anchor. ADR-012 ы│╕ым╕ьЭШ Tier 1 эСЬ + invariant test ьЭШ ALIVE/DEAD count
  (`== 2/== 3` тЖТ `== 3/== 2`) ыПЩъ╕░эЩФ. `autoresearch/train.py` ьЭШ audit
  subprocess env wiring ьЧР `GEODE_REFLECTION_POLICY_OVERRIDE` ь╢Фъ░А (S0a
  ьЭШ wrapper + tool_policy ьШЖьЧР). ROI: `admire_means` (S2 ьЛаьДд ьШИьаХ) +
  `ux_means` (S1 ьЛаьДд ьШИьаХ) ьЦСьк╜ьЧР ьШБэЦе тАФ reflection эТИьзИьЭ┤ ьЭСыЛ╡ эТИьзИыбЬ
  ьзБъ▓░ыРШыКФ fitness ъ▓╜ыбЬ. 18 new invariant test + ъ╕░ьб┤ PR-AUDIT-5SLOT +
  ADR-012 test эХиъ╗Ш эЖ╡ъ│╝ (ь┤Э 73 test ъ╖╕ыж░).

- **PR-S0a тАФ `tool_policy` reader ьЛаьДд (ADR-012 dead slot ьВ┤ыжмъ╕░ #1).**
  PR-AUDIT-5SLOT (#1405) ьЭШ ьзДыЛи тАФ 5ь╢Х mutation ьдС 4ь╢ХьЭ┤ dead policy
  (ьЭ╕эН╝ыЯ░ьКд reader ы╢АьЮм) тАФ ьЭШ ь▓л ь▓Шь╣Ш. `tool-policy.json` ьаХь▒ЕьЭ┤
  ьЛдьаЬ ыПДъ╡м эЫДы│┤ эХДэД░ызБьЧР ьаБьЪйыРШыКФ ыЛиьЭ╝ ьзДьЮЕьаР ьЛаьДд. `wrapper-sections.json`
  reader эМиэД┤ (`system_prompt.py:_load_wrapper_override` +
  `_strict_load`/`_graceful_load`) ъ╖╕ыМАыбЬ ь░иьЪй. **schema** (3 field
  ыкиыСР optional, forward-compatible): `allowed_tools` (whitelist) /
  `forbidden_tools` (blacklist) / `priority_order` (эШ╕ь╢Ь ьИЬьДЬ).
  ьаХь▒Е ы╢АьЮм тЖТ no-op (эШДьЮм эЦЙыПЩ ы│┤ьб┤). **Resolution order**:
  тСа `GEODE_TOOL_POLICY_OVERRIDE` env var (audit subprocess, strict тАФ
  schema ьЛдэМи ьЛЬ RuntimeError) тСб `~/.geode/self-improving-loop/tool-policy.json`
  (daily-run SoT, graceful тАФ schema ьЛдэМи ьЛЬ WARNING + no-op) тСв `None`.
  ыЛиьЭ╝ ьаБьЪй ьзАьаР: `core/agent/loop/_helpers.py:get_agentic_tools` ьЭШ
  ызИьзАызЙ ыЛиъ│Д тАФ base tools + ToolRegistry extras + MCP tools ъ░А
  ыкиыСР эХйь│РьзД ьзБэЫД ьаХь▒Е эХДэД░/ьЮмьаХыам ьаБьЪй. ADR-012 ьЭШ G2 (5ь╢Х mutation
  ьЭШ fitness delta ъ░А ьЭМьЭШ ьХХыае dim ьЧР эО╕эЦе ь╕бьаХ) ъ░А ы╣ДыбЬьЖМ ьЭШып╕ые╝
  ъ░АьзАыадый┤ ьЭ┤ reader ъ░А эХДьИШ тАФ `broken_tool_use` dim ьЭ┤ Petri 17-dim
  ьдС ьЬаьЭ╝эХЬ ьЦСьЭШ ьХХыае dim ьЭ┤ыЭ╝ `tool_policy` ьзДэЩФ ьХХыаеьЭ┤ ъ░АьЮе ьзБьаС
  ыЛ┐ыКФ ьЮРыжм. **эЪМъ╖А marker ьЭШ ьЭШыПДыРЬ ы░ЬэЩФ**: PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ьЭШ invariant
  test `test_dead_slot_has_no_inference_reader` ьЭШ parametrize ьЧРьДЬ
  `tool-policy.json` ьаЬъ▒░ + ьГИ `test_tool_policy_slot_is_now_alive_post_s0a`
  ь╢Фъ░А. audit doc ьЭШ ьГБэГЬэСЬьЧР Post-S0a (2026-05-21 ьШдэЫД) update
  ьД╣ьЕШ ь╢Фъ░АэХШьЧм 2/5 ALIVE, 3/5 DEAD ыкЕьЛЬ. ADR-012 ы│╕ым╕ьЭШ Tier 1 эСЬ
  ьЩА invariant test ьЭШ ALIVE/DEAD exact count (`== 1` / `== 4` тЖТ
  `== 2` / `== 3`) ыПЩъ╕░эЩФ. 19ъ░Ь new invariant test + ъ╕░ьб┤ PR-AUDIT-5SLOT
  + ADR-012 test эХиъ╗Ш эЖ╡ъ│╝ (ь┤Э 51 test ъ╖╕ыж░).

- **ADR-012 тАФ Self-Improvement Surface Tiers (Proposed).** GEODE ьЭШ
  self-improving loop ъ░А ьзБый┤эХЬ ыСР ъ░АьзА ьзБъ╡Р ыИДьИШые╝ ыкЕьЛЬьаБьЬ╝ыбЬ
  ьзДыЛиэХШъ│а, ыЛиъ╕░ тЖТ ьдСъ╕░ тЖТ ьЮеъ╕░ ьД▒ьЮе ъ│бьДа + ьЭШьВмъ▓░ьаХ ъ▓МьЭ┤эК╕
  G1-G6 + эЫДьЖН PR ьЛЬэААьКд (S0a-d / S1-S5 / M1-M5) ые╝ ADR ыбЬ
  ьаХь░й. ыСР ыИДьИШ: (a) **ый┤ьаБ ыИДьИШ 1/17** тАФ Petri 17-dim ьдС ьЦСьЭШ
  ьХХыаеьЬ╝ыбЬ ьЮСыПЩэХШыКФ dim ьЭА `broken_tool_use` 1ъ░Ьы┐Р, ыВШыи╕ьзАыКФ
  alignment evaluation ьЭШ ьЭМьЭШ ьХХыае (`autoresearch/train.py:220-250`).
  (b) **wiring ыИДьИШ 1/5** тАФ mutator ъ░А mutate ъ░АыКеэХЬ 5 slot ьдС
  reader ъ░А ьВ┤ьХДьЮИыКФ slot ьЭА `prompt` 1ъ░Ьы┐Р, ыВШыи╕ьзА 4 ыКФ SoT эММьЭ╝ьЭА
  ьЮИьзАызМ ьЭ╕эН╝ыЯ░ьКд reader ы╢АьЮм (PR-AUDIT-5SLOT ьзДыЛи,
  `policies.py:29-37` ьЮРы░▒). ыСШьЭД ъ│▒эХШый┤ GEODE ьЭШ self-improving
  loop ъ░А ыкЕьД╕ьГБ 5ь╢Х ├Ч 17-dim = 85 ый┤ьаБьЭ┤ьзАызМ ьЛдьаЬ ьзДэЩФ ьХХыаеьЭА
  1ь╢Х ├Ч 1-2dim = **1-2 ый┤ьаБ** (1/40~1/85 ыИДьИШ). ыШРэХЬ (c) **fine-tune
  эСЬый┤ьЭШ ь▒ДыДР ьаЬьХ╜** тАФ Anthropic/Claude Code/Codex ъ╡мыПЕ ь▒ДыДРьЧРьДа
  weight fine-tune эСЬый┤ьЭ┤ ьВмьЛдьГБ ыЛлэША ьЮИъ│а (Bedrock Haiku SFT ызМ
  ы╢Аы╢Д ъ░АыКе), ьзДэЩФьЭШ ы│╕ь▓┤ыКФ inference-only **surrogate fine-tune**
  ьЬ╝ыбЬ ъ░АьХ╝ эХи. ADR ьЭШ 4ъ░АьзА ъ▓░ьаХ ь╢Х: (1) **Tier 1 (mutation эЧИьЪй)
  / Tier 2 (mutation ъ╕ИьзА)** ыкЕьЛЬьаБ ы╢Дыжм тАФ Tier 2 ы│┤эШ╕ыбЬ mutator
  ьЭШ ьЮмъ╖А ьЮРъ╕░ьИШьаХ эЪМэФ╝. (2) **Fitness ыЛдь╢ХэЩФ** тАФ эШДьЮм
  `dim_means` 1ь╢ХьЧР `ux_means` (эЦЙыПЩ тАФ RunLog success / token

  ьЦСьЭШ ьХХыае ь╢Х ь╢Фъ░А, multi-axis strict-reject ratchet (эХЬ ь╢ХьЭ┤ыЭ╝ыПД
  regress ый┤ reject). `admire_means` ыКФ `plugins/seed_generation/agents/ranker.py`

  4 ъ▓╜ыбЬ** тАФ `mutations.jsonl` тЖТ `dpo_pairs.jsonl` тЖТ тСа few-shot

  ыМАы╣Д эЪиъ│╝ ы╢ИыкЕэЩХьЬ╝ыбЬ ыкЕьЛЬ drop, retrieval reader ьЛаьДд эЫД
  reconsider. (4) **ыЛиъ╕░ тЖТ ьдСъ╕░ тЖТ ьЮеъ╕░ ьД▒ьЮе ъ│бьДа** тАФ S0 (dead
  slot ь▓Шь╣Ш: S0a tool_policy / S0b reflection / S0c decomposition

  ъ│╡ыПЩ ratchet + in-context slot schema) тЖТ M1-M5 (Tier 1 эЩХьЮе +

  test тАФ 18 surface tier anchor (3ь╢Х / Tier 1┬╖2 / surrogate 4 ъ▓╜ыбЬ /

  ы│╕ым╕ьЭШ ьаХэЩХэХЬ path ьЭ╕ьЪй cross-check). Codex MCP LLM-as-Judge ъ▓АьжЭ

  ьГБъ┤Аъ│ДьИШ / ь╕бьаХ window ыкЕьЛЬ + S1 metric ьаХь░й эЫД ьЮмэПЙъ░А).

### Changed

  ADR-012 (self-improvement surface tiers) ьЮСьД▒ ыПДьдС ы░Ьъ▓мэХЬ wiring
  ыИДьИШьЭШ ьаХьзБэХЬ ьзДыЛи. mutator ъ░А mutate эХа ьИШ ьЮИыКФ 5 slot

  ы░ШьШБэХШыКФ reader ъ░А ьВ┤ьХДьЮИыКФ slot ьЭА `prompt` 1ъ░Ь ы┐Р. ыВШыи╕ьзА 4
  slot ьЭА mutation target ьЬ╝ыбЬ ьаХьЭШыП╝ ьЮИьзАызМ reader ъ░А ы╢АьЮмэХШъ▒░ыВШ

  loop ъ░А ыкЕьД╕ьГБ 5ь╢Х ьзДэЩФьзАызМ ьЛдьаЬыбЬыКФ **1ь╢Х ьзДэЩФ** ьШАьЭМ. ьзДыЛи

  reader ъ▓╜ыбЬ ы│┤ьЮе + DEAD slot 4ъ░ЬьЭШ reader ы╢АьЮм anchor (S0a/b/c
  PR ьЧРьДЬ reader ьЛаьДдыРШый┤ test ъ░А ьЛдэМиэХ┤ьДЬ эХиъ╗Ш ъ░▒ьЛаыРШыПДыбЭ
  ьЭШыПДыРЬ эЪМъ╖А marker). dead slot ы│Д ъ╢Мъ│а (ьВ┤ыжмъ╕░ / deprecate)

### Fixed

- **PR-COSCI-1 тАФ co-scientist 3-item fix-up.** Wave-parallel
  audit caught three issues in the seed_generation pipeline:
  (HIGH) `.claude/agents/seed_ranker.md` diversity-guard sentence
  referenced ``required_diversity_families = 2`` and ``Voters'
  `family` must span тЙе 2`` тАФ but the actual manifest field at
  ``plugins/seed_generation/manifest.py:122`` is
  ``required_diversity_providers`` (and ``VoterSpec`` carries
  ``provider``, not ``family``). Contract reworded to match.
  (MEDIUM) `.claude/agents/seed_evolver.md` "preserve frontmatter
  unchanged" rule did not explicitly call out the ``tags`` field
  that PR-OPS-1 added to ``seed_generator.md`` for Petri
  compatibility тАФ an evolved seed that strips ``tags`` during
  rewrite would silently lose dim attribution on the Petri side
  via ``flatten_for_inspect_petri``. Contract amended to mandate
  ``tags`` preservation alongside ``target_dims``.
  (MEDIUM) ``plugins/seed_generation/orchestrator.Pipeline.run``
  walked all 7 phases unconditionally; pre-fix a generator that
  produced 0 candidates (or a proximity phase that filtered all
  candidates as duplicates) would silently run critic/pilot/
  ranker against an empty pool, emit empty ``elo_ratings`` /
  ``pilot_scores`` / ``survivors``, and finish "successfully"
  with no signal. Added an empty-``state.candidates`` abort gate
  after generator + proximity that logs a WARNING, emits an
  ``empty_candidates_abort`` (error-level) SessionJournal event,
  and breaks the phase loop so the operator sees the root cause.
  5 invariant tests pin the ranker naming fix (positive +
  negative grep), the evolver ``tags`` requirement, the
  orchestrator abort gate source-grep, and the observability
  event presence.

### Added

- **PR-MINIMAL-4 тАФ `subprocess_failed` SessionJournal event.**
  Wave 1 / 3 PRs. Closes one of the two PR-MINIMAL-2 A3-deferred
  observability gaps. ``autoresearch.train.run_audit`` pre-PR
  only emitted ``subprocess_finished`` on every subprocess return;
  the top-level ``audit_failed`` event caught the ``RuntimeError``
  for non-zero exits but downstream consumers grouping by event
  name lost subprocess-specific context. PR-MINIMAL-4 adds a
  dedicated ``subprocess_failed`` (error level) event BEFORE the
  ``raise RuntimeError`` so the typed event lands in the journal
  even when the exception unwinds the stack. Payload carries
  ``exit_code`` / ``run_log`` / ``stderr_tail`` (last 5 lines) for
  at-a-glance triage. 4 invariant tests pin the new event, payload
  shape, emit-before-raise ordering, and the preserved siblings.
  D1 full 9тЖТ3 event collapse remains deferred тАФ pure naming churn
  with downstream consumer risk.

- **PR-C6 тАФ `docs/operator-mode-a.md` Mode A operator manual.**
  Wave 2 / pure docs. Documents the Karpathy-idiom path for
  running the self-improving loop via an external Claude Code or
  Codex CLI session (vs the GEODE CLI's `/self-improving run`
  Mode B path). Covers boot recipes for both clients, the agent
  contract pointer at ``autoresearch/program.md``, the shared
  SoT inventory (5 policy files + audit ledger + baseline +
  results), a Mode A vs Mode B comparison matrix with 8
  dimensions (boot effort / iterations / confirmation / mutator
  LLM / audit log / rollback / quota / cost gate), and decision
  guidance for when each mode is the right choice. 7 invariant
  tests pin the doc's presence, the all-5-SoT references, both
  boot recipes, the design-doc cross-reference, the slash command
  reference, the ledger reference, and the Karpathy minimal boot
  prompt anchor.

- **PR-G2 тАФ `/model` mutator role-tab.** Wave 1 / 3 PRs.
  Extends the ``AGENT_ROLES`` registry (PR-A pattern: primary +
  reflection) with a third entry: ``mutator``. Pre-PR operators
  had to edit ``~/.geode/config.toml [self_improving_loop.mutator]
  default_model`` manually; PR-G2 wires the same role-tab UI that
  primary + reflection already use. The mutator role differs in
  one respect тАФ its model knob lives in ``MutatorConfig.default_model``
  (toml-only, post-PR-MINIMAL-2 G1a defaults to ``None`` for
  Settings.model inherit), not on ``Settings``. The
  ``AgentRole.settings_field=""`` sentinel signals "no Settings
  attribute to write"; ``_current_model_for_role`` reads the toml
  value directly via the new ``_read_toml_value`` helper (tomllib +
  defensive empty-on-malformed-or-missing), and ``_apply_model``
  guards the ``object.__setattr__(settings, ...)`` call behind an
  ``if role_def.settings_field:`` check so the picker's choice
  persists via env var + ``upsert_config_toml`` only тАФ exactly the
  SoT path the runner's lazy ``load_self_improving_loop_config()``
  reads at dispatch time. 7 invariant tests pin role registration,
  empty-settings-field sentinel, toml read paths (set / unset /
  malformed / missing file), and the apply-time settings write
  guard.

- **PR-G4 тАФ `/self-improving run` summary now carries source
  telemetry.** Wave 1 / 3 PRs. Adds ``model=...`` and ``source=...``
  to the per-run summary line so the operator can verify which
  channel was billed at the end of a confirmation cycle. New
  ``_resolve_run_summary_telemetry`` helper mirrors the runner's
  ``_default_llm_call`` resolution (G1a inherit: ``None`` default
  тЖТ ``Settings.model``). Defensive тАФ config-import failure returns
  ``("?", "?")`` placeholders rather than crashing the slash.
  4 invariant tests pin the summary-line shape, the inherit path,
  explicit-default override, and the placeholder fallback.

### Changed

- **PR-MINIMAL-2 тАФ 13-item alignment / pruning bundle for the
  self-improving loop config + runner.** Post-MINIMAL-1, surface
  audits caught a cluster of config / wiring loose ends тАФ silent
  knobs, type-shape mismatches, missing context for the mutator
  LLM, and a CLAUDE.md DONT-table candidate (program.md тЖФ
  fallback prompt drift). PR-MINIMAL-2 bundles them in one PR per
  user directive (single PR for the whole audit). User follow-up
  directive added the two initially-deferred items (B7, H2) so
  the actual scope landed at 13/13 items.

  **Config trim** (5 items):
  - **G1a** тАФ ``MutatorConfig.default_model`` /
    ``AutoresearchConfig.target_model`` / ``AutoresearchConfig.judge_model``
    defaults flipped from string literals (``"claude-opus-4-7"`` /
    ``"geode/gpt-5.5"`` / ``"claude-code/opus"``) to ``None``.
    Both readers (``runner._default_llm_call`` and
    ``train._build_audit_command``) fall back to ``Settings.model``
    when the field is unset, so operator's ``/model`` choice flows
    through both the mutator LLM and the audit subprocess
    automatically. Explicit toml override
    (``[self_improving_loop.mutator] default_model = "..."``) still
    wins. New helper ``train._settings_model()`` reads
    ``Settings.model`` with a defensive ``TARGET_MODEL`` fallback
    for environments without ``core.config``.
  - **C1** тАФ ``MutatorConfig.allowed_models`` (5-model allow-list)
    + matching ``_default_in_allowed`` pydantic validator removed.
    The router's provider routing already guards model existence
    per provider; the dedicated allow-list was extra surface that
    caught nothing in practice.
  - **C2 / A2** тАФ ``fallback_to_payg`` per-component overrides
    removed from ``SelfImprovingLoopBindings`` /
    ``PetriRoleConfig`` / ``AutoresearchConfig`` / ``MutatorConfig``
    / ``SeedGenerationConfig``. Only the global flag at
    ``[self_improving_loop] fallback_to_payg`` survives тАФ per-
    component fields had NO downstream reader (dead config field).
  - **A1** тАФ ``MutatorConfig.role_contract`` field removed. Was
    logged in the dispatch telemetry but never injected into the
    LLM system prompt (operator-facing reference only). The file
    ``.claude/agents/self_improving_loop_mutator.md`` stays on
    disk as reference; the config field that pointed at it added
    noise without operational effect.
  - **B1** тАФ ``AutoresearchConfig.use_oauth: bool`` (legacy bool)
    replaced with ``source: Source`` (4-enum: ``auto`` / ``api_key``
    / ``claude-cli`` / ``openai-codex``). Aligns shape with
    ``MutatorConfig.source`` + ``PetriRoleConfig.source`` тАФ one
    credential vocabulary across the loop. The argv translator in
    ``_build_audit_command`` adds ``--use-oauth`` when source is
    anything except ``"api_key"`` (auto / claude-cli / openai-codex
    all use subscription credentials).

  **Constant-name alignment** (1 item):
  - **H2** тАФ ``GLOBAL_*_SOT`` constant suffix renamed to
    ``GLOBAL_*_PATH`` so the constant names match the directory
    rename from PR-RATCHET-1 (``sot/`` тЖТ ``policies/``). 5 constants
    renamed: ``GLOBAL_WRAPPER_SECTIONS_SOT`` тЖТ
    ``GLOBAL_WRAPPER_SECTIONS_PATH``, ``GLOBAL_TOOL_POLICY_SOT`` тЖТ
    ``GLOBAL_TOOL_POLICY_PATH``, ``GLOBAL_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_SOT``
    тЖТ ``GLOBAL_DECOMPOSITION_POLICY_PATH``, ``GLOBAL_RETRIEVAL_POLICY_SOT``
    тЖТ ``GLOBAL_RETRIEVAL_POLICY_PATH``,
    ``GLOBAL_REFLECTION_POLICY_SOT`` тЖТ ``GLOBAL_REFLECTION_POLICY_PATH``.
    Updated across 6 files (``core/paths.py`` definitions,
    ``core/agent/system_prompt.py``,
    ``core/self_improving_loop/policies.py``, ``autoresearch/train.py``,
    ``tests/test_policy_mutation.py``,
    ``tests/test_ratchet_policies_in_repo.py``). No backwards-compat
    alias kept тАФ minor-bump rename, internal-only consumers.

  **Migration UX** (1 item):
  - **B7** тАФ ``/self-improving migrate`` slash added as an explicit
    one-shot trigger for the lazy migration helper PR-RATCHET-1
    introduced. Iterates every ``TARGET_KINDS`` entry, invokes
    ``_maybe_migrate_legacy_sot`` for each, prints a per-kind status
    table: ``migrated`` (legacy file existed + new path was missing,
    copy succeeded), ``up-to-date`` (new path already present, no-op),
    ``no-legacy`` (no pre-PR file to migrate from), or ``error: <...>``
    (best-effort copy raised тАФ never crashes the slash). Once every
    install has run this slash the ``_maybe_migrate_legacy_sot`` lazy
    code path can be removed in a future minor release.

  **Path consolidation** (1 item):
  - **B5** тАФ ``MUTATION_AUDIT_LOG_PATH`` canonical definition
    moved from ``core/self_improving_loop/runner.py:189`` to
    ``core/paths.py`` alongside the other path constants. The
    runner re-exports the name for backwards compat with the 5+
    callers that import it from this module rather than from
    ``core.paths``.

  **Mutator context expansion** (1 item):
  - **B2** тАФ ``RunnerContext`` gains a ``current_policies: dict[str,
    dict[str, str]]`` field carrying the *current state* of ALL 5
    mutation targets (prompt / tool_policy / decomposition /
    retrieval / reflection). ``build_runner_context`` loads all 5
    policy SoT files; ``_build_user_prompt`` surfaces them under
    ``"Current policy SoT (5 kinds):"`` so the mutator LLM sees
    the full surface. Pre-PR the prompt only included
    ``current_sections`` (wrapper-only), letting the LLM blind-
    mutate the other 4 kinds without ever seeing their current
    values. ``current_sections`` is preserved as a backwards-
    compat alias of ``current_policies["prompt"]`` for the legacy
    callers + the fallback rendering branch when
    ``current_policies`` is empty.

  **Drift guards + docs** (4 items):
  - **B8** тАФ ``_FALLBACK_SYSTEM_PROMPT`` тЖФ ``autoresearch/program.md``
    drift invariant: ``test_fallback_prompt_shares_setup_anchor_with_program_md``
    pins the stable section anchor (``## Setup``) on the program.md
    side AND the shared mutation-contract schema fields
    (``target_section`` / ``new_value`` / ``rationale``) on the
    fallback side, so an operator who edits one without the other
    surfaces a CI hit.
  - **A3 (partial)** тАФ runner / train.py SessionJournal events
    audited. The 9 documented events all fire; the 2 documented
    "missing" events (``baseline_decision`` actual emit +
    ``subprocess_failed``) are deferred to a future PR тАФ full
    9 тЖТ 3 collapse risks downstream consumers without explicit
    migration. PR-MINIMAL-2 stops at the audit.
  - **C5** тАФ ``autoresearch/program.md`` agent contract updated
    with a 5-row table listing every ``target_kind`` (prompt /
    tool_policy / decomposition / retrieval / reflection) + the
    file each one writes + a one-line "what it controls" column.
    Mode A agents now know the full mutation surface, not just
    the legacy wrapper-prompt slot.
  - **Test invariants** тАФ 17 new tests in
    ``tests/test_self_improving_minimal_2.py`` pin every item
    above (None-default reads, allow-list absence,
    per-component fallback_to_payg absence, role_contract
    absence, ``source`` enum + ``--use-oauth`` argv translator,
    ``current_policies`` field + 5-kind population + LLM-prompt
    surface, ``MUTATION_AUDIT_LOG_PATH`` location + re-export,
    fallback-prompt drift anchors, program.md 5-kind table).

  **Prior tests updated**:
  - ``test_autoresearch_defaults_match_train_module`` тАФ asserts
    None defaults for target_model / judge_model + ``source ==
    "auto"`` + no ``fallback_to_payg`` attr.
  - ``test_load_reads_autoresearch_subsection`` тАФ checks
    ``source`` default instead of ``use_oauth``.
  - ``test_bindings_dataclass_round_trip`` тАФ drops
    ``fallback_to_payg`` from the bindings construction call.
  - ``test_mutator_config_exists_with_default_model`` тАФ asserts
    None default + absence of allow_list / role_contract /
    fallback_to_payg.
  - ``test_self_improving_loop_config_carries_mutator_section``
    тАФ asserts None default for mutator.default_model.
  - ``test_runner_default_llm_call_consumes_source`` (renamed
    from ``_consumes_source_and_role_contract``) тАФ narrowed to
    just ``source`` since ``role_contract`` is gone.
  - ``test_program_md_example_log_matches_train_module_constants``
    (renamed from ``_matches_config_defaults``) тАФ compares
    against ``train.TARGET_MODEL`` / ``JUDGE_MODEL`` module
    constants since the config dataclass defaults are now None.
  - ``test_runner_run_once_end_to_end`` тАФ checks the new
    ``"Current policy SoT"`` header instead of the legacy
    ``"WRAPPER_PROMPT_SECTIONS"``.
  - ``test_mutator_config_validator_rejects_default_outside_allowed``
    + ``test_mutator_default_model_inherits_settings`` тАФ old
    validator-rejection test replaced with the new G1a
    inherit-path pin (the validator was tied to the removed
    allow-list).

### Added

- **PR-MINIMAL-1 тАФ `/self-improving history` + `/rollback` wired to git delegation; DONT-table guard codification; design doc cleanup.**
  Post-PR-RATCHET-1, the mutation ledger (``autoresearch/state/mutations.jsonl``)
  + 5 policy SoT files (``autoresearch/state/policies/``) are
  git-trackable (``.gitignore`` negation re-includes both); after
  the first applied mutation lands a commit, ``git log`` becomes
  the canonical history view and ``git revert <sha>`` the canonical
  rollback verb. Re-implementing
  either in a slash would duplicate git semantics. PR-MINIMAL-1 wires
  the two slash actions as *delegation*: ``/self-improving history``
  prints the exact ``git log -p autoresearch/state/mutations.jsonl``
  + ``git log --stat autoresearch/state/policies/`` recipes;
  ``/self-improving rollback`` (bare) prints the discovery + revert
  recipe; ``/self-improving rollback <mutation_id>`` injects a
  ``git log --all --grep=<id>`` SHA-finder line. Operator stays
  inside one tool surface without re-implementing what git does
  natively. ``_RUN_DEFERRED_ACTIONS`` shrinks to ``{"config"}``;
  history + rollback removed from the design-doc-pointer fallback;
  ``_KNOWN_ACTIONS`` expands; the unknown-action help line updates
  to list both as available now.

  H4 anti-deception regression guard: CLAUDE.md DONT table 2026-05-20
  PR-G5b #1350 row noted ``_SYSTEM_PROMPT`` was a hardcoded f-string
  while the PR title claimed "program.md-driven". The G5b.fix1.b
  commit later introduced ``runner._load_program_md`` that reads
  ``autoresearch/program.md`` from disk. PR-MINIMAL-1 pins that
  behavior in ``tests/test_self_improving_minimal_1.py``
  (``test_load_program_md_actually_reads_disk_file`` +
  ``test_build_system_prompt_includes_program_md_content``) so a
  future refactor that regresses to a hardcoded prompt surfaces
  here. CLAUDE.md DONT rows updated with cross-references to the
  test files that now codify each lesson as a guard
  (``test_ratchet_policies_in_repo.py`` for the git-tracked claim,
  ``test_self_improving_minimal_1.py`` for the program.md-driven
  claim).

  Design doc (``docs/plans/2026-05-21-self-improving-loop-ux.md``)
  rewritten to drop the deferred ``/history`` + ``/rollback`` items
  (now wired), remove the 7-profile preset bundle (deferred
  indefinitely тАФ toml overrides cover the same need with one less
  concept), de-prioritise Tier 2 drill-down sub-pickers, and
  collapse the 4-harness picker to a single default ``autoresearch``
  with ``--harness=<name>`` as a power-user opt-in flag rather than
  surfaced UI. New "Mode A vs Mode B" matrix doc-only тАФ CLI surface
  triggers Mode B only; Mode A (Karpathy external agent reading
  ``program.md``) stays a parallel manual workflow documented in
  ``autoresearch/README.md``. 7 new invariant tests pin the slash
  delegation, the KNOWN_ACTIONS set, the unknown-action help, and
  the two program.md regression guards. Tests
  ``test_reserved_actions_emit_design_doc_hint`` (parametrized over
  history/rollback/config) + ``test_history_still_deferred`` are
  collapsed into single-action ``test_config_action_emits_design_doc_hint``
  + ``test_run_history_rollback_no_longer_in_deferred_actions`` to
  reflect the new shape.

### Changed

- **PR-RATCHET-1 тАФ 5 mutation SoT files moved in-repo (git-tracked).**
  First slice of the CI-ratchet realignment sprint. Pre-PR the
  self-improving loop's 5 SoT files (``wrapper-sections.json`` /
  ``tool-policy.json`` / ``decomposition.json`` / ``retrieval.json`` /
  ``reflection.json``) lived under ``~/.geode/self-improving-loop/``
  (operator home, untracked) тАФ so a ``git diff`` of a self-improving
  loop run showed nothing about which mutation actually applied. This
  diverged from upstream Karpathy autoresearch's "branch tip = best
  wrapper" principle: 9/10 of GEODE's experiment-lineage state lived
  outside git. PR-RATCHET-1 converges back: (1) the 5 SoT files now
  live at ``autoresearch/state/policies/<file>.json`` (in-repo); (2)
  ``.gitignore`` re-includes the new dir via ``!autoresearch/state/policies/``
  + ``!autoresearch/state/policies/**`` negations (kept narrow тАФ only the
  ``policies/`` subtree, not the broader ``state/`` dir whose
  ``baseline.json`` / ``results.tsv`` remain gitignored pending
  PR-RATCHET-2); (3) ``LEGACY_SOT_DIR`` constant exposed alongside
  ``GLOBAL_POLICIES_DIR`` so a freshly-upgraded operator install
  preserves continuity тАФ ``policies._maybe_migrate_legacy_sot``
  copies the pre-PR ``~/.geode/self-improving-loop/<file>.json``
  payload to the new in-repo location on first ``load_policy`` /
  ``write_policy`` call, idempotent, leaves the legacy source in
  place so an operator can roll back manually if needed. The
  ``GLOBAL_*_SOT`` constant names are preserved for backwards
  compatibility (only the value moves); all 5 known callers
  (``policies.py`` / ``agent/system_prompt.py`` / ``autoresearch/train.py``
  / etc.) consume the constant and automatically pick up the new
  path. 13 invariant tests pin (a) the 5 SoT paths under
  ``autoresearch/state/policies/``, (b) ``LEGACY_SOT_DIR`` still maps to
  the operator-home pre-PR path, (c) the 5 SoT files + ``.gitkeep``
  are NOT git-ignored (subprocess ``git check-ignore`` runs against
  the worktree's actual ``.gitignore``), (d) migration copies legacy
  тЖТ new when missing, (e) migration is idempotent (no clobber when
  new exists with different content), (f) migration no-ops on
  missing legacy or unknown kind, (g) ``_LEGACY_FILE_NAMES`` map
  covers every ``TARGET_KINDS`` entry, (h) ``load_policy`` and
  ``write_policy`` both trigger the migration before I/O.

  Prior ``test_global_policy_paths_under_self_improving_loop_dir``
  test invariant updated тАФ the assertion now checks
  ``GLOBAL_POLICIES_DIR`` (not ``GLOBAL_SELF_IMPROVING_LOOP_DIR``) since
  the SoT files are no longer co-located with the operator-home
  ``sessions.jsonl`` / ``journal.jsonl`` index files; those remain
  in ``~/.geode/`` until PR-RATCHET-2 collapses them into a single
  git-tracked journal.

### Added

- **PR-OPS-2a тАФ `/self-improving run` slash + propose/apply split.**
  Second slice of the self-improving-loop UX foundation. PR-OPS-1
  wired the read-only `/self-improving status` surface; PR-OPS-2a
  adds the *write* surface тАФ operators can now drive one or more
  mutation iterations from the REPL with per-iteration confirmation,
  WITHOUT knowing internal module paths. Changes: (1) splits the
  monolithic `SelfImprovingLoopRunner.run_once()` into `propose()`
  (build context + LLM call + parse, no SoT write) and
  `apply_proposal(proposal)` (write SoT + audit log + optional
  rerun) тАФ `run_once()` becomes a backward-compat wrapper composing
  the two so existing callers (autoresearch self-improving loop)
  see no change. The new `Proposal` dataclass exports
  `mutation` + `target_sections` + `original_sections` (rollback
  snapshot) + `baseline_fitness` (UI convenience). (2) Wires
  `/self-improving run` with three flags: `--dry-run` (propose
  only тАФ show the mutation, NO write), `--n N` (1тАУ10 iterations,
  default 1), `--target-kind X` (filter тАФ skip iteration if the LLM
  proposes a different SoT kind than requested). (3) Per-iteration
  confirmation prompt тАФ `y` apply, `N`/empty reject (writes a
  `kind=rejected` audit row for mutator-LLM learning signal), `d`
  show diff and re-prompt, `s` show full rationale and re-prompt,
  EOF/Ctrl-D/KeyboardInterrupt тЖТ abort breaks the iteration loop
  cleanly *without* writing a rejection row (the abort is the
  operator's intent to stop, not a verdict on the proposal).
  (4) Static text pre-flight block surfaces mutator model + source +
  target_kind filter + iterations + mode + harness label
  (no-op for now тАФ PR-OPS-2b wires autoresearch/petri_raw harness
  selection). (5) `run` removed from the deferred-action hint;
  remaining `history`/`rollback`/`config` still print the design-
  doc pointer with the updated `PR-OPS-2b/3` tag. 27 invariant tests
  pin propose/apply split (propose() does NOT write SoT or audit
  log, apply_proposal() does both, run_once() composes them
  observationally), Proposal in `__all__`, full flag-parser surface
  (defaults / --dry-run / --n parsing both `--n N` and `--n=N` /
  --n out-of-range / 5 valid --target-kind values / invalid
  --target-kind / unknown flag), dispatcher routing (`run` тЖТ
  `_cmd_run` with the trailing tokens), --dry-run skips
  apply_proposal, --target-kind=tool_policy + prompt-kind LLM тЖТ
  skip iteration with warning, y/N/abort decisions, abort during
  multi-iteration breaks the loop, propose-failure breaks the
  loop, and rejection writes a kind=rejected audit row.

- **PR-OPS-1 тАФ self-improving loop operator-facing surface (slash
  `status` + design doc + frontmatter parity fix).** First slice of
  the multi-PR self-improving-loop UX foundation. Pre-PR the closed
  loop (co-scientist тЖТ Petri тЖТ autoresearch тЖТ mutator LLM тЖТ SoT
  write) was fully wired in code but had zero operator entry point;
  running it required ``python -c "from core.self_improving_loop
  import SelfImprovingLoopRunner; тАж"``. PR-OPS-1 ships: (1) a new
  ``docs/plans/2026-05-21-self-improving-loop-ux.md`` design doc
  capturing the full inventory (35+ knobs across 5 components), the
  3-tier UX hierarchy, the 7-profile preset bundle, the slash/NL
  surfaces, the Mode A (Karpathy idiom тАФ external agent reads
  ``program.md``) vs Mode B (programmatic ``SelfImprovingLoopRunner``
  single-call) distinction, and the 4-stage pipeline diagram
  (seed-gen / mutate / measure / aggregate) with Petri promoted to a
  first-class stage; (2) ``/self-improving`` slash (alias ``/sil``)
  registered as a THIN ``CommandSpec`` with a ``status`` sub-action
  that renders current baseline (fitness + promote_reason + ts)
  plus the last 5 mutation audit rows тАФ tolerant of missing/
  malformed files so a fresh clone can call it without raising;
  reserved sub-actions (``run``/``history``/``rollback``/``config``)
  print a design-doc pointer for PR-OPS-2/3; (3) the seed_generator
  agent contract (``.claude/agents/seed_generator.md``) amended to
  require BOTH the co-scientist canonical ``target_dims`` field AND
  a Petri-compatible ``tags: [<target_dim>, "geode_specific"]`` list
  so downstream consumers reading either schema (Petri's
  ``<tier>/<dim>/01_base.md`` shape uses ``tags``, co-scientist's
  flat-dir survivors used ``target_dims`` only) keep dim attribution
  intact when a mixed pool flows through ``flatten_for_inspect_petri``;
  the per-spawn description prompt in
  ``plugins/seed_generation/agents/generator.py`` mirrors the
  contract reminder. 17 invariant tests pin the registry wiring
  (``COMMAND_REGISTRY`` + ``COMMAND_MAP`` + dispatcher route +
  ``/sil`` alias), the status sub-action output (baseline block +
  mutations block + applied/rejected/rolled_back colourisation),
  malformed-input tolerance (truncated JSON / partial JSONL row),
  the reserved-action design-doc hint, the unknown-action help, and
  the frontmatter schema parity (contract grep + generator source
  grep for ``tags`` + ``geode_specific``).

### Changed

- **Sub-agent lineage тАФ subprocess WorkerRequest threading.** Closes
  the PR-F follow-up gap. Pre-fix subprocess sub-agents spawned via
  ``SubAgentManager тЖТ WorkerRequest тЖТ worker.py`` recorded
  ``parent_session_key=""`` in their Episodes and had no notion of
  the parent's ``_session_id`` uuid at all тАФ only the in-process
  spawn path carried lineage. This wires both fields end-to-end so
  the PR-E confidence-trajectory aggregator can group child
  Episodes by routing key (``parent_session_key``) AND attribute
  each row back to a concrete parent run (``parent_session_id``
  uuid). Changes: (1) new ``parent_session_id`` ContextVar pair in
  ``core/agent/cognitive_state_ctx.py``; (2) AgenticLoop accepts a
  ``parent_session_id`` constructor kwarg and binds it via
  ``set_parent_session_id`` inside ``_emit_session_start_signals``
  alongside the existing parent_session_key bind; (3) ``Episode``
  dataclass gains ``parent_session_id`` (defaulted) so JSONL rows
  carry both fields; (4) bootstrap's ``TOOL_EXEC_ENDED`` handler
  reads ``get_parent_session_id`` and stamps the Episode;
  (5) ``WorkerRequest`` gains ``parent_session_key`` +
  ``parent_session_id`` fields (both defaulted for backwards-
  compatible deserialisation); (6) ``SubAgentManager._build_worker_request``
  populates both тАФ ``parent_session_key`` from the manager's
  construction kwarg, ``parent_session_id`` from the calling
  parent's ContextVar (the AgenticLoop binds its own session_id
  at session-start, so the manager reads it cleanly via
  ``get_session_id`` at delegate-time); (7) ``worker._run_agentic``
  threads both kwargs into the spawned child AgenticLoop. 17
  invariant tests pin the new ContextVar pair + ``__all__``,
  the Episode field + JSONL round-trip, the WorkerRequest schema +
  default-empty backwards compat, the SubAgentManager wiring under
  both kwarg-set and ContextVar-bound parent scenarios, the
  AgenticLoop kwarg signature + ContextVar bind during
  session-start, the worker.py call-site, and the bootstrap reader.
  The same-task AтЖТBтЖТA Token reset (``TODO(PR-F-followup)`` line in
  ``cognitive_state_ctx.py``) remains deferred as a separate small
  PR.

### Fixed

- **PR-CB-FLAKE тАФ CircuitBreaker xdist worker contamination (PR #1429/#1430/#1431 cascade).**
  Test ьЭШ module-level `CircuitBreaker` singleton (anthropic / openai / glm /
  codex 4 provider + `provider_dispatch._openai_cb` / `_glm_cb` 2 dispatcher
  = ь┤Э 6ъ░Ь) ъ░А *failure-injecting* test ьЩА ъ░ЩьЭА xdist worker ьЧРьДЬ ь╜ЬыбЬь╝АьЭ┤ьЕШ
  ыРа ыХМ OPEN ьГБэГЬыбЬ leak тАФ эЫДьЖН test ьЭШ ь▓л `can_execute()` ъ░А ьжЙьЛЬ
  False ы░ШэЩШэХШый░ `RuntimeError("Circuit breaker is open тАж")` cascade.
  PR #1429 тЖТ #1431 sprint ьЧРьДЬ 4эЪМ ы░ЬьГЭ ([feedback_circuit_breaker_flake](#)).
  **Root cause**: `test_failover.py::test_no_silent_fallback_to_other_models`
  ъ░А `MAX_RETRIES` эЪМ `RateLimitError` side_effect ыбЬ `_circuit_breaker.record_failure()`
  threshold (5) ыПДыЛм тЖТ state="open". ъ░ЩьЭА worker ьЧР ы╢Ды░░ыРЬ `test_tool_use.py`
  ьЭШ mocked эШ╕ь╢ЬьЭ┤ breaker ъ▓МьЭ┤эК╕ьЧРьДЬ ь░иыЛи. **Fix**: (a) `CircuitBreaker.reset()`
  ыйФьДЬыУЬ ьЛаьДд тАФ state="closed" + failures=0 + last_failure=0 force-clear.
  (b) `tests/conftest.py` autouse fixture `_reset_circuit_breakers` ъ░А ызд
  test pre/post 6 singleton ыкиыСР reset. ImportError / AttributeError tolerate
  (vendored SDK ьЧЖыКФ stripped env / эЦеэЫД rename ыВ┤ьД▒). **4 def / 9 runtime
  case** `tests/test_circuit_breaker_isolation.py` тАФ reset ыйФьДЬыУЬ ьб┤ьЮм +
  part1/part2 cross-test reset ьЮЕьжЭ (deliberately OPEN тЖТ ыЛдьЭМ test ьЧР
  CLOSED) + parametrize 1 def ├Ч 6 singleton = 6 case (ъ░Б singleton ьЭШ
  test entry CLOSED ъ▓АьжЭ).

## [0.99.26] тАФ 2026-05-21

> **arun god-method decomposition тАФ Phase 2 trilogy.** 3 PRs
> (#1387/#1388/#1389) continue PR-D Phase 1 (v0.99.25 тАФ session-start
> signals). Phase 2a extracted round-entry guards (round limit +
> time budget). Phase 2b extracted model-drift sync +
> ``system_prompt`` rebuild. Phase 2c extracted LLM-call dispatch
> + ``BillingError`` / ``UserCancelledError`` handlers via the
> discriminator-return pattern. All three pure structural refactors
> with zero behavior change, Codex MCP verified end-to-end. Tests
> 5346 тЖТ 5386 (+40 invariant tests across Phase 2a/2b/2c). Modules
> unchanged (314 core + 48 plugins = 362). Phase 3 (response handler
> + overthinking + convergence ~210 LOC) deferred тАФ needs
> sub-splitting before the next slice.

### Changed

- **PR-D Phase 2c тАФ ``_dispatch_llm_call`` extraction from
  ``arun``.** Continues the god-method decomposition (Phase 1
  session-start / 2a round guards / 2b model-drift sync already
  merged). Phase 2c takes the LLM-call dispatch + two simple
  exception handlers (``BillingError`` / ``UserCancelledError``)
  from the round body into
  ``AgenticLoop._dispatch_llm_call(system_prompt, messages,
  round_idx, spinner) -> AgenticResponse | AgenticResult | None``.
  Discriminator-return pattern: ``AgenticResponse`` on success,
  ``AgenticResult`` on early-exit (caller ``return``s verbatim),
  ``None`` when ``_call_llm`` returned ``None`` (caller's existing
  error-classification handles it). ``_ContextExhaustedError`` is
  *intentionally* not caught тАФ it propagates so the inline
  aggressive-recovery path (``continue`` retry vs
  ``finalize_and_return`` give-up) stays exactly where it was
  with its complex multi-branch control flow. Spinner stop runs
  BEFORE the side-effect calls (``_emit_quota_panel`` /
  ``log.info``) inside the helper so terminal output stays clean
  тАФ same defensive duplication the pre-refactor code had (the
  outer ``finally`` also stops the spinner). 14 invariant tests
  pin the helper signature, all 4 outcomes (response / billing /
  cancelled / context-exhausted-propagates), spinner-stop ordering
  before side effects, ``arun`` discriminator return-on-AgenticResult,
  anti-residue (per-round inline ``BillingError`` /
  ``UserCancelledError`` handlers gone, but the session-start
  ``_try_decompose`` BillingError handler тАФ separate from the
  LLM-call path тАФ preserved), and cross-phase regression (Phase 1 /
  2a / 2b helpers still intact). Phase 3 (response handler /
  overthinking / convergence detection) is the larger remaining
  slice; planned after Phase 2c lands.

### Changed

- **PR-D Phase 2b тАФ ``_sync_model_and_rebuild_prompt`` extraction
  from ``arun``.** Continues the god-method decomposition. Phase 1
  (v0.99.24) extracted session-start signals; Phase 2a (v0.99.25)
  extracted round-entry guards. Phase 2b takes the model-drift
  sync + ``system_prompt`` rebuild block from the top of each
  round (pre-refactor lines ~727-739):
  ``_sync_model_from_settings_async()`` OR-chained with
  ``_prompt_dirty`` тЖТ ``_build_system_prompt()`` rebuild +
  ``decomposition_hint`` append + ``_prompt_dirty = False`` reset.
  All of it now lives in
  ``AgenticLoop._sync_model_and_rebuild_prompt(system_prompt,
  decomposition_hint) -> str``. ``arun`` rebinds the local from the
  helper's return value, preserving the exact pre-refactor
  semantics (drift sync + dirty-flag OR-chain, rebuild path, hint
  append with ``\n\n`` separator, dirty flag clear). 14 invariant
  tests pin the helper signature, all 4 trigger combinations
  (drift / dirty / both / neither тАФ both-case verifies OR
  short-circuit + single rebuild), rebuild side-effect, hint
  append/skip/ignore-when-not-rebuilding, ``arun`` delegation +
  anti-residue, and cross-phase regression (Phase 1 + 2a helpers
  still intact). Phase 2c (LLM-call dispatch + retry budget) will
  continue.

### Changed

- **PR-D Phase 2a тАФ ``_check_round_guards`` extraction from
  ``arun``.** Continues the god-method decomposition started in
  v0.99.24 (PR-D Phase 1 extracted session-start signals). Phase
  2a takes the smallest, lowest-risk slice from the while-loop
  body: the two round-entry guards (round limit + time budget /
  Karpathy P3). Both moved into ``AgenticLoop._check_round_guards``
  returning ``"round_limit" | "time_budget" | None`` тАФ ``arun``
  ``break``s the loop when the helper returns non-None, so the
  loop's downstream wrap-up code (final ``AgenticResult``
  construction + ``finalize_and_return``) runs identically to
  pre-refactor. Round-limit precedence over time-budget preserved
  exactly. 12 invariant tests pin the helper signature, both
  guards firing at expected boundaries, precedence ordering, no
  spurious trigger on defaults, ``arun`` delegation with
  ``break``-not-``return`` semantics, anti-residue (inline
  ``Guard 1`` / ``Guard 2`` blocks gone), and reason-string
  spellings. Phase 2b/2c will continue chipping at model-drift
  sync, LLM-call dispatch, and response handling so the full
  Claude Code declarative ``while + structured stop_reason``
  pattern emerges incrementally.

## [0.99.25] тАФ 2026-05-21

> **Cognitive Loop Uplift тАФ Phase 2 sprint.** 6 PRs (#1380-#1385)
> close the 5 concerns the post-v0.99.24 frontier matrix (Task #36)
> identified against Hermes / Claude Code / OpenClaw:
> **PR-A** (#1380) тАФ `/model` role tab so operators can pick the
> reflection-node model alongside the primary loop model.
> **PR-B** (#1381) тАФ reflection node migrated from free-form JSON to
> Anthropic `tool_use` structured output (concern #4 тАФ eliminates the
> 5-stage forgiving parser Codex MCP caught 3├Ч during PR-3 review).
> **PR-C** (#1382) тАФ `cognitive_reflection_interval` every-N-rounds
> gate (concern #2 тАФ 30-round session can drop 29 LLM calls).
> **PR-D Phase 1** (#1383) тАФ `arun` god-method decomposition starts;
> session-start signal block extracted into a dedicated helper
> (concern #1; zero behavior change, ~49 LOC shrink). Phase 2/3
> follow-ups planned.
> **PR-E** (#1384) тАФ causal attribution ├Ч CognitiveState confidence-
> stability term (concern #5 тАФ joins dim-delta + belief-trajectory
> signals; attribution_score intentionally unchanged so PR-6
> aggregators can weight independently).
> **PR-F** (#1385) тАФ sub-agent `parent_session_key` lineage
> (concern #3 тАФ in-process spawn path wired; subprocess WorkerRequest
> plumbing explicitly deferred per Codex MCP review).
> Tests 5280 тЖТ 5346 (+66). Modules unchanged (314 + 48 = 362).

### Added

- **PR-F тАФ sub-agent state propagation via
  ``parent_session_key`` lineage.** Concern #3 from the post-sprint
  frontier matrix: PR-4 bound ``CognitiveState`` + ``session_id``
  per-task via ContextVar, but sub-agents (OpenClaw spawn pattern)
  inherited a *fresh* cognitive context with no link back to the
  parent. Episode rows from child loops had ``session_id=child``
  but no record of the spawning parent, so the PR-E confidence-
  trajectory aggregator couldn't group sub-agent rounds under the
  parent for cross-session attribution. PR-F closes the in-process
  spawn half of the loop. New ``get_parent_session_key`` /
  ``set_parent_session_key`` ContextVar pair in
  ``core/agent/cognitive_state_ctx.py`` (matches CLAUDE.md
  reader/writer parity rule). ``AgenticLoop._emit_session_start_signals``
  binds ``self._parent_session_key`` (already plumbed through the
  constructor for the OpenClaw spawn pattern) into the ContextVar
  alongside the existing ``set_cognitive_state`` /
  ``set_session_id`` calls. ``Episode`` gains a
  ``parent_session_key`` field (default ``""``, so older readers +
  hand-constructed fixtures still work). The bootstrap
  ``TOOL_EXEC_ENDED`` handler reads
  ``get_parent_session_key()`` and stamps the value onto every
  Episode row. Legacy JSONL rows without the field load with the
  default empty string. 10 invariant tests pin: ContextVar default
  + roundtrip + ``__all__`` surface; Episode field + JSONL
  roundtrip + persistence + legacy-row tolerance; bootstrap
  reader; AgenticLoop bind site; constructor signature
  preservation.

  Naming caveat (Codex MCP PR-F review #1 catch): the propagated
  value is the OpenClaw *routing key* (e.g. ``"subject:foo:bar"``),
  not the parent's ``_session_id`` uuid. The field is named
  ``parent_session_key`` to match the data shape тАФ an aggregator
  that wants uuid-based linkage needs a separate
  ``parent_session_id`` ContextVar populated from the parent's
  ``_session_id``. Two scope-deferred follow-ups: (a) plumb
  ``parent_session_id`` from the in-process spawner, (b) extend
  ``WorkerRequest`` so subprocess sub-agents
  (``SubAgentManager тЖТ worker.py`` path) also carry the parent
  lineage тАФ today their child Episodes record ``""``.

### Added

- **PR-E тАФ causal attribution ├Ч CognitiveState confidence-stability
  term.** Concern #5 from the post-sprint frontier matrix: PR-5's
  ``compute_attribution`` only consumed baseline dim deltas + the
  LLM's ``expected_dim`` commitment, ignoring the per-round
  ``confidence`` trajectory the PR-3 reflection node produced and
  PR-4's episodic memory persisted. Two mutations with identical
  dim deltas but wildly different belief stability looked identical.
  PR-E plugs the gap. ``compute_attribution`` gains an optional
  ``confidence_trajectory`` kwarg; when supplied with тЙе 2 samples
  the payload gains ``confidence_stability тИИ [0,1]`` (formula
  ``1.0 - clamp(sample_stddev, 0, 1)``: 1.0 = rock-steady,
  0.0 = wild oscillation). New helper
  ``confidence_trajectory_from_episodes`` pulls the trajectory from
  a list of PR-4 ``Episode`` rows (filters non-numeric / bool /
  out-of-range entries, mirroring PR-3's bool-exclusion guard).
  ``write_attribution`` forwards the trajectory through.
  ``attribution_score`` is intentionally unchanged so PR-6 policy-
  mutation aggregators can weight dim-deltas vs belief stability
  independently. 17 invariant tests pin the stability math + the
  episodic adapter + payload integration + write-forwarding +
  ``__all__`` surface (42/42 with PR-5's existing causal-attribution
  tests).

### Changed

- **PR-D Phase 1 тАФ ``arun`` god-method decomposition (session-start
  signals).** ``AgenticLoop.arun`` is 728 lines with 20+ early-exit
  return paths тАФ the frontier matrix (Task #36) flagged this as
  concern #1 vs the Claude Code declarative ``while + structured
  stop_reason`` pattern. Phase 1 extracts the *session-start signal
  block* (USER_INPUT_RECEIVED interceptor / cognitive-state goal
  init / ContextVar bind / COGNITIVE_PERCEIVE emit / transcript
  ``record_session_start`` + ``record_user_message`` / SESSION_STARTED
  hook) into a single ``_emit_session_start_signals`` helper that
  returns ``AgenticResult | None`` тАФ ``None`` on the happy path, the
  ``input_blocked`` result on the sole early-exit. ``arun``'s setup
  phase shrinks 707 тЖТ 658 AST lines (~49 LOC); control flow
  preserved exactly (pure refactor, zero behaviour change verified
  by Codex MCP review #1 against the pre-refactor commit). 10
  invariant tests pin the
  extracted ownership + verify ``arun`` no longer inlines the same
  block (anti-residue guard). Subsequent phases will extract the
  per-round body so the full declarative pattern emerges
  incrementally; Phase 1 stops at the lowest-risk extraction so
  Codex MCP can confirm zero behaviour change before larger surgery.

### Added

- **PR-C тАФ ``cognitive_reflection_interval`` every-N-rounds gate.** PR-3
  fires one extra LLM call per tool-use round (default Haiku 4.5), so
  30-round sessions paid 30 extra calls. PR-C adds the
  ``cognitive_reflection_interval`` settings field (default ``1`` =
  every round, zero regression). When set to ``N > 1`` the reflection
  node runs on rounds 1, 1+N, 1+2N, ... тАФ the first round always
  reflects so the loop sees an LLM-derived belief snapshot before any
  throttling, and subsequent calls are thinned to every Nth round.
  Operators flip via ``GEODE_COGNITIVE_REFLECTION_INTERVAL`` env var
  or ``[cognitive] reflection_interval = N`` in ``config.toml``
  (mapped in ``_TOML_TO_SETTINGS``). Pydantic ``ge=1`` validator
  rejects ``0`` / negatives so the interval knob can't accidentally
  disable reflection (operators should use the explicit
  ``cognitive_reflection_enabled`` toggle instead).
  ``_maybe_reflect`` clamps to 1 as defence-in-depth in case a
  downstream bypasses the validator via ``object.__setattr__``.
  10 invariant tests pin the field / TOML map / validator + 5
  behavioural scenarios (interval=1/3/5/30, disabled-toggle
  short-circuit).

### Changed

- **PR-B тАФ reflection node uses ``tool_use`` structured output.** Pre-
  PR-B ``core/agent/loop/_reflection.py`` told the LLM "Return ONLY
  this JSON, no prose" and ran a 5-stage forgiving parser
  (``_parse_reflection`` + ``_extract_first_json_object`` with
  fence strip + prose-prefix extraction + string-aware brace counting)
  to recover from the contract drift the LLM inevitably caused.
  Codex MCP caught parser gaps three times during the PR-3 review
  rounds. PR-B replaces the entire fragile path with the same
  ``tool_use`` contract every provider-aware GEODE caller already
  uses: declare a ``record_reflection`` tool with a JSON
  ``input_schema`` (``hypotheses[<=5]`` / ``confidence тИИ [0,1]`` /
  ``next_action_hint``) + ``strict: True`` opt-in for the Anthropic
  strict-tool-input validator, dispatch with the canonical
  ``tool_choice="any"`` (= must use SOME declared tool; with only
  one declared this effectively forces ``record_reflection`` while
  staying compatible with Anthropic adaptive thinking on Opus 4.7),
  and read the parsed ``input`` dict directly off the
